---
title: "DEgenes_heatmap"
author: "Shuo Shan"
date: "01/05/2023"
output: html_document

---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
## Load packages  
```{r package, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(magrittr)
library(tidyverse)
library(gplots)
library(ggfortify)
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
library(cowplot)
library(ggpubr)
library(DESeq2)
library(ComplexHeatmap)

Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
setwd(Dir)
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))
res.atac.dds.frb = readRDS("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/ATACseq_DolphinNext/DESeq2/DESeq2_results_ATACseq_peaks_1kb_FRB.Rdata")
res.atac.dds.krt = readRDS("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/ATACseq_DolphinNext/DESeq2/DESeq2_results_ATACseq_peaks_1kb_KRT.Rdata")
res.atac.dds.mel = readRDS("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/ATACseq_DolphinNext/DESeq2/DESeq2_results_ATACseq_peaks_1kb_MEL.Rdata")
res.chip.dds.frb = readRDS("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/ChIP-seq/DESeq2/DESeq2_results_H3K27acChIPseq_peaks_1kb_FRB.Rdata")
res.chip.dds.krt = readRDS("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/ChIP-seq/DESeq2/DESeq2_results_H3K27acChIPseq_peaks_1kb_KRT.Rdata")
res.chip.dds.mel = readRDS("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/ChIP-seq/DESeq2/DESeq2_results_H3K27acChIPseq_peaks_1kb_MEL.Rdata")
link_gene_promoter = readRDS(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/link_gene_promoter_within_300kbp_of_TSS_allcts.Rdata"))
link_gene_enhancer = readRDS(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/link_gene_enhancer_within_300kbp_of_TSS_allcts.Rdata"))
FRB_cRE_dynamics = readRDS(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/FRB_gene_and_cRE_RNA_ATAC_and_H3K27ac_dynamics.Rdata"))
MEL_cRE_dynamics = readRDS(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/MEL_gene_and_cRE_RNA_ATAC_and_H3K27ac_dynamics.Rdata"))
KRT_cRE_dynamics = readRDS(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/KRT_gene_and_cRE_RNA_ATAC_and_H3K27ac_dynamics.Rdata"))
FRB_cRE_dynamics = readRDS(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/FRB_gene_and_cRE_RNA_ATAC_and_H3K27ac_dynamics.Rdata"))

df3 = readRDS(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/enhancer_count_by_gene.rds"))
```
# Load file
## loading RNAseq data and DESeq2 results
```{r load-rna, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE}
rna_dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/RNA-Seq"
CPM_rna=data.table::fread(paste0(rna_dir,"/CPM_3cts.txt"))
CPM_rna = CPM_rna %>% column_to_rownames(. , var="V1")
new_colnames=c(colnames(CPM_rna)[grepl("PBS_KRT",colnames(CPM_rna))],
               colnames(CPM_rna)[grepl("PBS_MEL",colnames(CPM_rna))],
               colnames(CPM_rna)[grepl("PBS_FRB",colnames(CPM_rna))],
               colnames(CPM_rna)[grepl("IFN_KRT",colnames(CPM_rna))],
               colnames(CPM_rna)[grepl("IFN_MEL",colnames(CPM_rna))],
               colnames(CPM_rna)[grepl("IFN_FRB",colnames(CPM_rna))])
CPM_rna <- CPM_rna[,new_colnames]

dir.krt <- "~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/RNA-Seq/keratinocytes/pipeline_11192022/analysis"
dir.mel <- "~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/RNA-Seq/melanocytes/pipeline_12022022/analysis"
dir.frb <- "~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/RNA-Seq/fibroblasts/pipeline_11192022/analysis"
rna.res.krt <- read.table(paste0(dir.krt,"/DESeq2_results_IFNvsPBS.txt"),header=T,sep=" ") %>% na.omit()
rna.res.mel <- read.table(paste0(dir.mel,"/DESeq2_results_IFNvsPBS.txt"),header=T,sep=" ") %>% na.omit()
rna.res.frb <- read.table(paste0(dir.frb,"/DESeq2_results_IFNvsPBS.txt"),header=T,sep=" ") %>% na.omit()
```
## loading ATACseq data
```{r cov-atac, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE}
atac_coverage_dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/chromatin/RegulatoryElements/method3"
# load raw coverage for enhancer and promoters
count_cRE <- data.table::fread(paste0(atac_coverage_dir,"/merged_coverage_ATACseq_allcts_regulatory_region.bed")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(chr,start,end)) %>% column_to_rownames("name")
# CPM
col.sum=apply(count_cRE,2,sum); 
CPM_atac=sweep(count_cRE, 2, col.sum, `/`)*1000000
CPM_atac <- CPM_atac[,c("F25_KRT_PBS","F49_KRT_PBS","F55_KRT_PBS",
                        "F25_MEL_PBS","F49_MEL_PBS","F55_MEL_PBS",
                        "F25_FRB_PBS","F49_FRB_PBS","F55_FRB_PBS",
                        "F25_KRT_IFN","F49_KRT_IFN","F55_KRT_IFN",
                        "F25_MEL_IFN","F49_MEL_IFN","F55_MEL_IFN",
                        "F25_FRB_IFN","F49_FRB_IFN","F55_FRB_IFN")]
rm(col.sum,count_cRE,atac_coverage_dir)
```
## loading H3K27ac ChIPseq data
```{r cov-chip, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE}
chip_coverage_dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/chromatin/RegulatoryElements/method3"
# load raw coverage for enhancer and promoters
count_cRE <- data.table::fread(paste0(chip_coverage_dir,"/merged_coverage_ChIPseq_allcts_regulatory_region.bed")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(chr,start,end)) %>% column_to_rownames("name")
# CPM
col.sum=apply(count_cRE,2,sum); 
CPM_chip=sweep(count_cRE, 2, col.sum, `/`)*1000000
CPM_chip <- CPM_chip[,c("F25_KRT_PBS","F49_KRT_PBS","F55_KRT_PBS",
                        "F25_MEL_PBS","F49_MEL_PBS","F55_MEL_PBS",
                        "F25_FRB_PBS","F49_FRB_PBS","F55_FRB_PBS",
                        "F25_KRT_IFN","F49_KRT_IFN","F55_KRT_IFN",
                        "F25_MEL_IFN","F49_MEL_IFN","F55_MEL_IFN",
                        "F25_FRB_IFN","F49_FRB_IFN","F55_FRB_IFN")]
rm(col.sum,count_cRE,chip_coverage_dir)
```
## Link of gene-promoter-enhancer-closest gene assigned
```{r link, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# link between gene-promoter and gene-enhancer
cRE_dict_dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/chromatin/RegulatoryElements/method3"
link_gene_promoter=data.table::fread(paste0(cRE_dict_dir,"/dictionary_gene_promoter_links_allcts.txt")) %>%
  set_colnames(c("gene","promoter","distance","celltype"))
link_gene_enhancer=data.table::fread(paste0(cRE_dict_dir,"/dictionary_closest_gene_enhancer_links_allcts.txt")) %>% 
  set_colnames(c("gene","enhancer","distance","celltype")) 

# annotation for each promoter/enhancer for each celltype.
gene_promoter_KRT <- data.table::fread(paste0(cRE_dict_dir,"/dictionary_gene_promoter_links_KRT.bed"))
gene_promoter_MEL <- data.table::fread(paste0(cRE_dict_dir,"/dictionary_gene_promoter_links_MEL.bed"))
gene_promoter_FRB <- data.table::fread(paste0(cRE_dict_dir,"/dictionary_gene_promoter_links_FRB.bed"))
gene_enhancer_KRT <- data.table::fread(paste0(cRE_dict_dir,"/dictionary_closest_gene_enhancer_links_KRT.bed"))
gene_enhancer_MEL <- data.table::fread(paste0(cRE_dict_dir,"/dictionary_closest_gene_enhancer_links_MEL.bed"))
gene_enhancer_FRB <- data.table::fread(paste0(cRE_dict_dir,"/dictionary_closest_gene_enhancer_links_FRB.bed"))
```
## Link of gene-promoter-enhancer-all cREs within 300kbp of TSS assigned
```{r link, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# link between gene-promoter and gene-enhancer
cRE_dict_dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/chromatin/RegulatoryElements/method4"
link_gene_cRE_KRT=data.table::fread(paste0(cRE_dict_dir,"/promoters_and_enhancers_surrounding_genes_KRT.bed")) %>%
  set_colnames(c("chr","start","end","name","region","gene","celltype","type"))

link_gene_cRE_FRB=data.table::fread(paste0(cRE_dict_dir,"/promoters_and_enhancers_surrounding_genes_FRB.bed"))%>%
  set_colnames(c("chr","start","end","name","region","gene","celltype","type"))

link_gene_cRE_MEL=data.table::fread(paste0(cRE_dict_dir,"/promoters_and_enhancers_surrounding_genes_MEL.bed")) %>%
  set_colnames(c("chr","start","end","name","region","gene","celltype","type"))

# annotation for each promoter/enhancer for each celltype.
gene_promoter_KRT <- link_gene_cRE_KRT %>% dplyr::filter(type=="promoter")
gene_promoter_MEL <- link_gene_cRE_MEL %>% dplyr::filter(type=="promoter")
gene_promoter_FRB <- link_gene_cRE_FRB %>% dplyr::filter(type=="promoter")
gene_enhancer_KRT <- link_gene_cRE_KRT %>% dplyr::filter(type=="enhancer")
gene_enhancer_MEL <- link_gene_cRE_MEL %>% dplyr::filter(type=="enhancer")
gene_enhancer_FRB <- link_gene_cRE_FRB %>% dplyr::filter(type=="enhancer")

# 
link_gene_promoter=rbind(gene_promoter_KRT, gene_promoter_MEL, gene_promoter_FRB)
link_gene_enhancer=rbind(gene_enhancer_KRT, gene_enhancer_MEL, gene_enhancer_FRB)
saveRDS(link_gene_promoter, file=paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/link_gene_promoter_within_300kbp_of_TSS_allcts.Rdata"))
saveRDS(link_gene_enhancer, file=paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/link_gene_enhancer_within_300kbp_of_TSS_allcts.Rdata"))
```
## loading ATACseq and H3K27ac ChIPseq DESeq2 results
```{r deseq2-load}
chip.res.krt=data.table::fread(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/DESeq2_results_H3K27acChIPseq_peaks_1kb_KRT.txt"),header=T,sep="\t")
chip.res.mel=data.table::fread(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/DESeq2_results_H3K27acChIPseq_peaks_1kb_MEL.txt"),header=T,sep="\t")
chip.res.frb=data.table::fread(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/DESeq2_results_H3K27acChIPseq_peaks_1kb_FRB.txt"),header=T,sep="\t")

atac.res.krt=data.table::fread(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/DESeq2_results_ATACseq_peaks_1kb_KRT.txt"),header=T,sep="\t")
atac.res.mel=data.table::fread(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/DESeq2_results_ATACseq_peaks_1kb_MEL.txt"),header=T,sep="\t")
atac.res.frb=data.table::fread(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/DESeq2_results_ATACseq_peaks_1kb_FRB.txt"),header=T,sep="\t")
```
## useful plotting functions
```{r nicekmeans, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# useful function
niceKmeans <- function (df, k, kmeans.algorithm = "Lloyd", iter.max = 1000, nstart=100) {
  
  result = data.frame();
  source = t(scale(t(df)));
  kmeans = kmeans(source, centers = k, iter.max = iter.max, algorithm=kmeans.algorithm, nstart=nstart);
  clustered = data.frame();
  breaks = c();
  for (i in 1:k) {
    print(sprintf("Doing cluster %i",i))
    cluster = source[kmeans$cluster==i,];
    rows = row.names(cluster);
    clust = heatmap.2(as.matrix(cluster), distfun=function(x) as.dist((1-cor(t(x)))/2))
    cluster.ordered = cluster[clust$rowInd,];
    cluster.ordered.genes = rows[clust$rowInd];
    row.names(cluster.ordered) = cluster.ordered.genes;
    class = data.frame(row.names=cluster.ordered.genes);
    class[,"class"] = i 
    cluster.ordered = cbind(cluster.ordered, class);
    clustered = rbind(clustered, cluster.ordered);
    if(i > 1 & i < k) {
      breaks[i] = as.numeric(breaks[i-1]) + length(rows);
    } else if(i==1) {
      breaks[i] = length(rows);
    }
  }
  
  result <- list();
  result$clustered <- clustered;
  result$breaks <- breaks;
  return(result);
}

```
```{r paired_plot_function, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE}
make_paired_plot <- function(this.title,this.df) {
  df = data.frame(CPM=as.numeric(this.df[1,]), sample=colnames(this.df)) %>%
    separate( . , col=sample, into=c("donor","treatment","celltype")) 
  df$treatment <- factor(df$treatment, levels = c("PBS","IFN"))
  
  position <- "identity"; width = 0.5; point.size = 2; line.size = 0.5
  line.color = "grey"; linetype = "solid"; palette="bright"
  
  highlightdata1 <- df %>% filter(donor=="F25")
  highlightdata2 <- df %>% filter(donor=="F49")
  highlightdata3 <- df %>% filter(donor=="F55")
  
  p <- ggplot(df, create_aes(list(x = "treatment", y = "CPM"))) +
    geom_exec(geom_line, data = df, group = "donor",
              color = line.color, size = line.size, linetype = linetype,
              position = position) +
    geom_exec(geom_point, data = df, color = "treatment", size = point.size,
              position = position) +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("#999999", "#E69F00")) +
    geom_exec(geom_line, data = highlightdata1, group = "donor",
              color = "blue", size = 0.7, linetype = linetype,
              position = position) +
    geom_exec(geom_line, data = highlightdata2, group = "donor",
              color = "brown", size = 0.7, linetype = linetype,
              position = position) +
    geom_exec(geom_line, data = highlightdata3, group = "donor",
              color = "black", size = 0.7, linetype = linetype,
              position = position) +
    ggtitle(this.title) +
    theme(legend.position="none") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold")) +
    facet_wrap(~ celltype)
  p
  return(p)
}
```
```{r make-many-paired-plots}
gene_lst=c("TNFAIP6","AXL","FN1","CCL13","AL807752.7","CCL2","CLU","NUPR1","SEMA7A","TNFRSF1B","CSF1","F2R","MDK","LACC1","THBS1","LGALS9","ASS1")
gene_lst_name="inflammatory_genes_cluster2+10+13+14"

gene_lst=c("TNFAIP6","AL807752.7","METRNL","NUPR1","SEMA7A","PTGIS","SOCS3","TNFRSF1B","MDK","TNC","LACC1","MMP3")
gene_lst_name="regulation_of_inflammatory_genes_cluster2+10+13+14"

gene_lst=read.table("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/literature/KEGG/hsa04621_KEGG-NOD-like-receptor-signaling-pathway.txt")$V1
gene_lst_name="KEGG-NOD-like-receptor-signaling-pathway"

gene_lst=rownames(km_res.rna.new[which(km_res.rna.new$newclass==2),])
gene_lst_name="cluster2_genes"

gene_lst=c("FOXM1","STAT1","STAT2","POU3F1","IRF8","ZNF317","IRF4","NFATC2","FOXO3","ZFP82","FOXA3","SIX2","FOXP2","NKX6-1","MEF2D","IRF1","BATF3","SIX1","TBP","CDX1","PIT1","HNF1A","FOXA2","SOX2","PO5F1","PO3F2","ANDR","Z354A","IRF3","MEF2C","FOXJ2","NR2E3","ZIM3","HXA9","CRX","ZFP28","REL","MEF2A","HNF1B","BATF","ZNF41","HXA13","TWST1","MYB","MAFF","PBX2","CEBPB","PRGR","ZN350","CEBPG","ZN382","CEBPE","GRHL2","SOX4","OVOL1","IRF7","SMCA1","SOX3","TF7L1","BC11A","ZN582","FOXJ3","PO2F1","GATA1","FEZF1","NF2L2","LHX3","FOXH1","ZN528","OLIG2","NFYA","NFIA","SPI1","NFIC","NFYC","HLF","NR6A1")
gene_lst_name="TF_enriched_in_MEL_only_opened_enhancers"

plot_list <- c()
for (i in 1:length(gene_lst)) {
  g <- gene_lst[i]
  p <- make_paired_plot(g,CPM_rna[g,])
  plot_list[[i]] <- p
}

pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/paired_plots_",gene_lst_name,".pdf"),width=15,height=8)
for (i in 1:length(plot_list)) {
  print(plot_list[[i]])
}
dev.off()
```
```{r make-simple-plot}
g="TGFB2"

df <- CPM_rna[g,] %>% t() %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("sample") %>%
  set_colnames(c("sample","cpm")) %>%
  tidyr::separate( . , col=sample, into=c("donor","condition","celltype"), sep="_",remove=FALSE)
df$condition <- ordered(df$condition, levels=c("PBS","IFN"))

ggplot(df, aes(x = celltype, y = cpm, fill = condition, group = condition)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = condition), position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.2, dodge.width = 0.8), size = 3) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(group = condition), 
    fun = mean, 
    geom = "crossbar", 
    width = 0.6, 
    color = "red", 
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black","blue")) +
  labs(
    title = g,
    y = "CPM",
    fill = "Condition",
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

```
# plot heatmaps round two
## Refined clustering of round one RNAseq heatmap (from folder ../heatmap_RNA)
```{r method1-rna-heatmap-round2-avgCPM10-log2FC1.5-14niceKmeans}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
setwd(Dir)
#load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

pbs_cols <- colnames(CPM_rna)[which(grepl("PBS",colnames(CPM_rna)))]
ifn_cols <- colnames(CPM_rna)[which(grepl("IFN",colnames(CPM_rna)))]
expressed_gene_MEL <- read.table(paste0(dir.mel,"/expressedGenes.txt"),header=F)$V1
expressed_gene_KRT <- read.table(paste0(dir.krt,"/expressedGenes.txt"),header=F)$V1
expressed_gene_FRB <- read.table(paste0(dir.frb,"/expressedGenes.txt"),header=F)$V1
selected_rows <- unique(c(expressed_gene_MEL, expressed_gene_FRB, expressed_gene_KRT))

CPM_rna_new <- CPM_rna %>% dplyr::filter(rownames(.) %in% selected_rows)

DEG <- unique(c(rna.res.krt[which(rna.res.krt$padj<0.05 & (rna.res.krt$log2FoldChange)>1.5),"gene"],
                rna.res.mel[which(rna.res.mel$padj<0.05 & (rna.res.mel$log2FoldChange)>1.5),"gene"],
                rna.res.frb[which(rna.res.frb$padj<0.05 & (rna.res.frb$log2FoldChange)>1.5),"gene"]))
CPM_rna_DEG <- CPM_rna_new %>% dplyr::filter(rownames(.) %in% DEG)
logCPM <- log2(CPM_rna_DEG + 1)

# split rows by determined number of clusters
km_res <- niceKmeans(logCPM, 14)
split_instructions <- c(rep(1,km_res$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res$breaks[2]-km_res$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res$breaks[3]-km_res$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res$breaks[4]-km_res$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,km_res$breaks[5]-km_res$breaks[4]),
                        rep(6,km_res$breaks[6]-km_res$breaks[5]),
                        rep(7,km_res$breaks[7]-km_res$breaks[6]),
                        rep(8,km_res$breaks[8]-km_res$breaks[7]),
                        rep(9,km_res$breaks[9]-km_res$breaks[8]),
                        rep(10,km_res$breaks[10]-km_res$breaks[9]),
                        rep(11,km_res$breaks[11]-km_res$breaks[10]),
                        rep(12,km_res$breaks[12]-km_res$breaks[11]),
                        rep(13,km_res$breaks[13]-km_res$breaks[12]),
                        rep(14,nrow(km_res$clustered)-km_res$breaks[13]))
km_res.rna <- km_res
split_instructions.rna <- split_instructions

# 4. load genes of interest
g <- data.table::fread("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/literature/KEGG/GSEA_hallmark-genes-upregulated-in-response-to-IFNG.txt",header=F)$V1
zlogCPM.heatmap <- km_res.rna$clustered[,1:ncol(CPM_rna_DEG)]
zlogCPM.heatmap_with_gene <- zlogCPM.heatmap %>% dplyr::filter(rownames(.) %in% g)
row_anno_index <- which(rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %in% rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap_with_gene))
row_anno_label <- rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap)[row_anno_index]

# 5. plot heatmap
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

row_ha = rowAnnotation(
  foo = anno_mark(at = row_anno_index, 
                  labels = row_anno_label,
                  which="row",
                  labels_gp = gpar(fontsize=10),
                  padding=unit(0.5,"mm")))

pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM.heatmap, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            right_annotation = row_ha,
                            column_title = "DE genes in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated, known IFNg inducible genes labeled",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("PBS_KRT",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("PBS_MEL",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("PBS_FRB",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("IFN_KRT",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("IFN_MEL",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("IFN_FRB",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions.rna, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()
cluster1_genes = rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==1)]

for (i in 1:14){
  this_cluster_genes = rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==i)]
  write(this_cluster_genes, file=paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/inducedGenes_log2FC1.5_cluster",as.character(i),".txt"))
}

```
```{r rearranged-method1-rna-heatmap-round2-avgCPM10-log2FC1.5-14niceKmeans}
# now the clusters are grouped based on general induction patterns:
# cluster1-4: commonly induced
# cluster5-8: paired induced
# cluster9-12: MEL-specific induction
# cluster13-14: KRT-specific induction
km_res.rna.new <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:14) {
  this.slice <- km_res.rna$clustered %>% dplyr::filter(class==i)
  this.slice$within_cluster_order <- seq(from=1, to=nrow(this.slice),by=1)
  km_res.rna.new <- rbind(km_res.rna.new, this.slice)
}

km_res.rna.new[,"newclass"] <- km_res.rna.new[,"class"] %>%
  gsub( 10 , "j" , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( 11 , "k" , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( 12 , "l" , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( 13 , "m" , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( 14 , "n" , . , fixed=T ) %>%
  gsub( 1, "a", . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( 2, "b", . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( 3, "c", . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( 4, "d", . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( 5, "e", . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( 6 , "f" , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( 7 , "g" , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( 8 , "h" , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( 9 , "i" , . , fixed=T ) 

  
  
km_res.rna.new$newclass <- km_res.rna.new$newclass %>%
  gsub( "a" , 8 , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( "b" , 3 , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( "c" , 1 , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( "d" , 4 , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( "e" , 5 , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( "f" , 12 , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( "g" , 7 , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( "h" , 9 , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( "i" , 11 , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( "j" , 6 , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( "k" , 2 , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( "l" , 14 , . , fixed=T ) %>% 
  gsub( "m" , 10 , . , fixed=T ) %>%
  gsub( "n" , 13 , . , fixed=T )

km_res.rna.new$newclass <- as.numeric(km_res.rna.new$newclass)
km_res.rna.new$within_cluster_order <- as.numeric(km_res.rna.new$within_cluster_order)
km_res.rna.new <- km_res.rna.new %>% arrange(newclass, km_res.rna.new$within_cluster_order)
split_instructions.new <- km_res.rna.new$newclass


# 4. load genes of interest
g <- data.table::fread("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/literature/KEGG/GSEA_hallmark-genes-upregulated-in-response-to-IFNG.txt",header=F)$V1
zlogCPM.heatmap.new <- km_res.rna.new[,1:ncol(CPM_rna_DEG)]
zlogCPM.heatmap_with_gene <- zlogCPM.heatmap.new %>% dplyr::filter(rownames(.) %in% g)
row_anno_index <- which(rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap.new) %in% rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap_with_gene))
row_anno_label <- rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap.new)[row_anno_index]

# 5. plot heatmap
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap.new) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap.new) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

row_ha = rowAnnotation(
  foo = anno_mark(at = row_anno_index, 
                  labels = row_anno_label,
                  which="row",
                  labels_gp = gpar(fontsize=10),
                  padding=unit(0.5,"mm")))

pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/heatmap_reordered_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM.heatmap.new, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            right_annotation = row_ha,
                            column_title = "DE genes in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated, known IFNg inducible genes labeled",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("PBS_KRT",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("PBS_MEL",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("PBS_FRB",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("IFN_KRT",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("IFN_MEL",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("IFN_FRB",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions.new, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

for (i in 1:14){
 this_cluster_genes = rownames(km_res.rna.new)[which(km_res.rna.new$newclass==i)]
 write(this_cluster_genes, file=paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/reordered_inducedGenes_log2FC1.5_cluster",as.character(i),".txt"))
}

# saving each cluster with extra gene information like avgCPM, log2FoldChange, and padj for each cell type.

rna.res.3cts.frb <- rna.res.frb %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","log2FoldChange","padj")) %>% set_colnames(c("gene","FRB_log2FC","FRB_padj"))
rna.res.3cts.krt <- rna.res.krt %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","log2FoldChange","padj")) %>% set_colnames(c("gene","KRT_log2FC","KRT_padj"))
rna.res.3cts.mel <- rna.res.mel %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","log2FoldChange","padj")) %>% set_colnames(c("gene","MEL_log2FC","MEL_padj"))
rna.res.3cts <- left_join(rna.res.3cts.frb, left_join(rna.res.3cts.krt, rna.res.3cts.mel, by="gene"), by="gene")

rna.avgCPM.pbs.frb <- data.frame(FRB_PBS_avgCPM=rowMeans(CPM_rna[,colnames(CPM_rna)[grepl("PBS_FRB",colnames(CPM_rna))]]))
rna.avgCPM.ifn.frb <- data.frame(FRB_IFN_avgCPM=rowMeans(CPM_rna[,colnames(CPM_rna)[grepl("IFN_FRB",colnames(CPM_rna))]]))
rna.avgCPM.pbs.krt <- data.frame(KRT_PBS_avgCPM=rowMeans(CPM_rna[,colnames(CPM_rna)[grepl("PBS_KRT",colnames(CPM_rna))]]))
rna.avgCPM.ifn.krt <- data.frame(KRT_IFN_avgCPM=rowMeans(CPM_rna[,colnames(CPM_rna)[grepl("IFN_KRT",colnames(CPM_rna))]]))
rna.avgCPM.pbs.mel <- data.frame(MEL_PBS_avgCPM=rowMeans(CPM_rna[,colnames(CPM_rna)[grepl("PBS_MEL",colnames(CPM_rna))]]))
rna.avgCPM.ifn.mel <- data.frame(MEL_IFN_avgCPM=rowMeans(CPM_rna[,colnames(CPM_rna)[grepl("IFN_MEL",colnames(CPM_rna))]]))
rna.avgCPM.3cts <- cbind(gene=rownames(CPM_rna),
                         rna.avgCPM.pbs.frb,
                         rna.avgCPM.ifn.frb,
                         rna.avgCPM.pbs.krt,
                         rna.avgCPM.ifn.krt,
                         rna.avgCPM.pbs.mel,
                         rna.avgCPM.ifn.mel)

rna.info.3cts <- left_join(rna.res.3cts, rna.avgCPM.3cts, by="gene") %>% column_to_rownames("gene")

for (i in 1:14){
 this_cluster_genes = rownames(km_res.rna.new)[which(km_res.rna.new$newclass==i)]
 this_cluster_genes_and_info = rna.info.3cts[this_cluster_genes,] %>% rownames_to_column("gene")
 this_cluster_genes_and_info = this_cluster_genes_and_info[,c("gene",
                                                              "FRB_log2FC","FRB_padj","FRB_PBS_avgCPM","FRB_IFN_avgCPM",
                                                              "KRT_log2FC","KRT_padj","KRT_PBS_avgCPM","KRT_IFN_avgCPM",
                                                              "MEL_log2FC","MEL_padj","MEL_PBS_avgCPM","MEL_IFN_avgCPM")]
 write.table(this_cluster_genes_and_info,file=paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/reordered_inducedGenes_and_info_log2FC1.5_cluster",as.character(i),".txt"),quote=F,row.names = F, col.names = T,sep="\t")
}


```
## Pick 14-niceKmeans cluster, make violin plot for each cluster on different metrics
```{r method1-violin-induction-14cluster}
# make a function for every cluster
compile_induction_matrix_for_cluster <- function(clusterN) {
  #clusterN=1
  this_cluster_genes <- rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==clusterN)]
  this_CPM.pbs <- CPM_rna[this_cluster_genes, grepl("_PBS",colnames(CPM_rna))] %>% set_colnames(gsub("_PBS","",colnames(.)))
  this_CPM.ifn <- CPM_rna[this_cluster_genes, grepl("_IFN",colnames(CPM_rna))] %>% set_colnames(gsub("_IFN","",colnames(.)))
  this_FC <- (this_CPM.ifn - this_CPM.pbs) / (this_CPM.pbs + 1)
  this_output <- this_FC %>% 
    pivot_longer( . , colnames(this_FC), names_to="sample", values_to = "FC") %>%
    mutate(cluster=clusterN)
  
  return(this_output)
}

# compile induction matrix and metadata
induction_matrix <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:14) {
  this_induction_matrix <- compile_induction_matrix_for_cluster(i)
  induction_matrix <- rbind(induction_matrix, this_induction_matrix)
}
induction_matrix <- induction_matrix %>% 
  tidyr::separate(., col=sample, into=c("donor","celltype"),sep="_", remove=FALSE) %>%
  mutate(log2FC = log2(FC + 1))

# make violin plot
p <- ggplot(induction_matrix, aes(factor(cluster), log2FC)) +
  geom_violin(aes(fill=factor(celltype)))  +
  theme(legend.position = "top")
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/04182023_violin_log2FC_14clusters.pdf"), width=24, height=8)
p
dev.off()
```
```{r method1-violin-baseExpression-14cluster}
# make a function for every cluster
compile_pbs_matrix_for_cluster <- function(clusterN) {
  #clusterN=1
  this_cluster_genes <- rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==clusterN)]
  this_CPM.pbs <- CPM_rna[this_cluster_genes, grepl("_PBS",colnames(CPM_rna))] %>% set_colnames(gsub("_PBS","",colnames(.)))
  this_output <- this_CPM.pbs %>% 
    pivot_longer( . , colnames(this_CPM.pbs), names_to="sample", values_to = "PBS_CPM") %>%
    mutate(cluster=clusterN)
  
  return(this_output)
}

# compile induction matrix and metadata
PBS_matrix <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:14) {
  this_PBS_matrix <- compile_pbs_matrix_for_cluster(i)
  PBS_matrix <- rbind(PBS_matrix, this_PBS_matrix)
}
PBS_matrix <- PBS_matrix %>% 
  tidyr::separate(., col=sample, into=c("donor","celltype"),sep="_", remove=FALSE) %>%
  mutate(PBSlog2CPM = log2(PBS_CPM + 1))

# make violin plot
p <- ggplot(PBS_matrix, aes(factor(cluster), PBSlog2CPM)) +
  geom_violin(aes(fill=factor(celltype)))  +
  theme(legend.position = "top")
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/04182023_violin_PBS-log2CPM_14clusters.pdf"), width=24, height=8)
p
dev.off()
```
```{r method1-reordered-violin-induction-14cluster}
# make a function for every cluster
compile_induction_matrix_for_cluster <- function(clusterN) {
  #clusterN=1
  this_cluster_genes <- rownames(km_res.rna.new)[which(km_res.rna.new$newclass==clusterN)]
  this_CPM.pbs <- CPM_rna[this_cluster_genes, grepl("_PBS",colnames(CPM_rna))] %>% set_colnames(gsub("_PBS","",colnames(.)))
  this_CPM.ifn <- CPM_rna[this_cluster_genes, grepl("_IFN",colnames(CPM_rna))] %>% set_colnames(gsub("_IFN","",colnames(.)))
  this_FC <- (this_CPM.ifn - this_CPM.pbs) / (this_CPM.pbs + 1)
  this_output <- this_FC %>% 
    pivot_longer( . , colnames(this_FC), names_to="sample", values_to = "FC") %>%
    mutate(cluster=clusterN)
  
  return(this_output)
}

# compile induction matrix and metadata
induction_matrix <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:14) {
  this_induction_matrix <- compile_induction_matrix_for_cluster(i)
  induction_matrix <- rbind(induction_matrix, this_induction_matrix)
}
induction_matrix <- induction_matrix %>% 
  tidyr::separate(., col=sample, into=c("donor","celltype"),sep="_", remove=FALSE) %>%
  mutate(log2FC = log2(FC + 1))
induction_matrix$celltype <- ordered(induction_matrix$celltype, levels=c("KRT","MEL","FRB"))

# make violin plot
p <- ggplot(induction_matrix, aes(factor(cluster), log2FC)) +
  geom_violin(aes(fill=factor(celltype)))  +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/04182023_reordered_violin_log2FC_14clusters.pdf"), width=24, height=8)
p
dev.off()
```
```{r method1-violin-baseExpression-14cluster}
# make a function for every cluster
compile_pbs_matrix_for_cluster <- function(clusterN) {
  #clusterN=1
  this_cluster_genes <- rownames(km_res.rna.new)[which(km_res.rna.new$newclass==clusterN)]
  this_CPM.pbs <- CPM_rna[this_cluster_genes, grepl("_PBS",colnames(CPM_rna))] %>% set_colnames(gsub("_PBS","",colnames(.)))
  this_output <- this_CPM.pbs %>% 
    pivot_longer( . , colnames(this_CPM.pbs), names_to="sample", values_to = "PBS_CPM") %>%
    mutate(cluster=clusterN)
  
  return(this_output)
}

# compile induction matrix and metadata
PBS_matrix <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:14) {
  this_PBS_matrix <- compile_pbs_matrix_for_cluster(i)
  PBS_matrix <- rbind(PBS_matrix, this_PBS_matrix)
}
PBS_matrix <- PBS_matrix %>% 
  tidyr::separate(., col=sample, into=c("donor","celltype"),sep="_", remove=FALSE) %>%
  mutate(PBSlog2CPM = log2(PBS_CPM + 1))
PBS_matrix$celltype <- ordered(PBS_matrix$celltype, levels=c("KRT","MEL","FRB"))

# make violin plot
p <- ggplot(PBS_matrix, aes(factor(cluster), PBSlog2CPM)) +
  geom_violin(aes(fill=factor(celltype)))  +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/04182023_reordered_violin_PBS-log2CPM_14clusters.pdf"), width=24, height=8)
p
dev.off()
```
## Correlation heatmap of RNAseq: 1) DEG and TFs; 2) DEG and DEG
```{r correlation-heatmap-log2FC1.5DEG-TF}
# first load log2FC1.5 heatmap .rdata
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

library(dplyr)
library(magrittr)
library(tidyverse)
library(gplots)
library(ggfortify)
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
library(cowplot)
library(ggpubr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)

# pick DE genes and TFs
TF_list=c("STAT1","STAT2","STAT3","STAT4","STAT5A","STAT5B","STAT6","NFKB1","NFKB2","RELA","RELB","REL","RUNX1","RUNX2","GATA2","GATA3","ATF1","ATF2","ATF3","ATF4","ATF5","ATF6","ATF6B","ATF7","BATF","BATF2","BATF3","IRF1","IRF2","IRF3","IRF4","IRF5","IRF6","IRF7","IRF8","IRF9","JUN","JUNB","JUND","FOS","FOSB","FOSL1","FOSL2","ETS1","ETS2","ERG","ETV3","ETV1","ETV4","KLF2","KLF3","KLF4","KLF5","KLF6","KLF8","KLF9","KLF10","KLF11","KLF12","KLF13","KLF15","KLF16","MAF","MAFA","MAFB","MAFF","MAFK","TEAD1","TEAD2","TEAD3","TEAD4","PRDM1","SOX1","SOX4","PRDM2","ELF1","ELF2","CBFB","FOXA1","AR")
gene_list=rownames(km_res.rna.new)
CPM_picked_genes <- CPM_rna[gene_list,]
CPM_TF <- CPM_rna[TF_list,]

# generate correlation matrix
mat.correlation <- matrix(nrow=length(gene_list), ncol=length(TF_list))
for (i in 1:length(gene_list)) {
  for (j in 1:length(TF_list)) {
    mat.correlation[i,j] <- cor(as.numeric(CPM_picked_genes[i,]), as.numeric(CPM_TF[j,]) , method="pearson")
  }
}
rownames(mat.correlation) <- gene_list
colnames(mat.correlation) <- TF_list

# plot heatmap of correlation matrix
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/correlation_heatmap_RNAseq_TF_vs_DEgenes_14cluster_04182023__padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10_pearsonColumnClustered.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(mat.correlation, 
                            name = "PCC",
                            column_title = "PCC correlation between DEG and TFs",
                            cluster_columns = TRUE,
                            clustering_distance_columns = "pearson",
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            row_split = split_instructions.new, 
                            show_row_names = TRUE,
                            show_column_names = TRUE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=3),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
```{r correlation-heatmap-log2FC1.5DEG-TF-log2FC}
tf <- data.table::fread("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/literature/Lambert_2018_human_TFs.txt",header=F) %>%
  dplyr::filter(V1 %in% rownames(CPM_rna)) %>%
  pull(V1) %>%
  unique()

# pick tf that is expressed in at least one celltype & with non-zero std deviation
temp <- apply(CPM_rna[tf,], 1, sd)
temp2 <- rownames(CPM_rna[tf,])[which(temp!=0)]
temp3 <- intersect(temp2, unique(c(expressed_gene_FRB,expressed_gene_MEL, expressed_gene_KRT)))
TF_list <- temp3
CPM_TF <- CPM_rna[TF_list,]

# pick log2FC1.5 induced genes
gene_list=rownames(km_res.rna.new)
CPM_picked_genes <- CPM_rna[gene_list,]

# generate correlation matrix
mat.correlation <- matrix(nrow=length(gene_list), ncol=length(TF_list))
for (i in 1:length(gene_list)) {
  for (j in 1:length(TF_list)) {
    mat.correlation[i,j] <- cor(as.numeric(CPM_picked_genes[i,]), as.numeric(CPM_TF[j,]) , method="pearson")
  }
}
rownames(mat.correlation) <- gene_list
colnames(mat.correlation) <- TF_list
```
```{r correlation-heatmap-log2FC1.5DEG-log2FC-TF-log2FC-celltypespecific}
# calculate log2FC
celltype="FRB"
expressed_genes=unique(c(expressed_gene_FRB))
CPM_PBS <- CPM_rna[expressed_genes,colnames(CPM_rna)[grepl("PBS",colnames(CPM_rna)) & grepl(celltype,colnames(CPM_rna))]]
CPM_IFN <- CPM_rna[expressed_genes,colnames(CPM_rna)[grepl("IFN",colnames(CPM_rna)) & grepl(celltype,colnames(CPM_rna))]]
log2FC <- log2(CPM_IFN + 1) - log2(CPM_PBS + 1) 
colnames(log2FC) <- gsub("_IFN","",colnames(log2FC))
log2FC <- na.omit(log2FC)

# pick tf from the gene list and with non-zero std deviation
tf <- data.table::fread("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/literature/Lambert_2018_human_TFs.txt",header=F) %>%
  dplyr::filter(V1 %in% rownames(log2FC)) %>%
  pull(V1) %>%
  unique()
temp <- apply(CPM_rna_DEG[tf,], 1, sd)
temp2 <- rownames(CPM_rna_DEG[tf,])[which(temp!=0)]
log2FC_TF <- log2FC[temp2,] %>% na.omit()
TF_list <- rownames(log2FC_TF)

# pick log2FC1.5 induced genes
gene_list <- intersect(rownames(km_res.rna.new), expressed_genes)
log2FC_genes <- log2FC[gene_list,] %>% na.omit()
gene_list <- rownames(log2FC_genes)
temp.split_instructions.new <- km_res.rna.new[gene_list,"newclass"]

# generate correlation matrix
mat.correlation <- matrix(nrow=length(gene_list), ncol=length(TF_list))
for (i in 1:length(gene_list)) {
  for (j in 1:length(TF_list)) {
    mat.correlation[i,j] <- cor(as.numeric(log2FC_genes[i,]), as.numeric(log2FC_TF[j,]) , method="pearson")
  }
}
rownames(mat.correlation) <- gene_list
colnames(mat.correlation) <- TF_list

# remove rows with standard deviation = 0
temp <- apply(mat.correlation, 2, sd)

# plot heatmap of correlation matrix
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/correlation_heatmap_RNAseq_based-on-log2FC_",celltype,"_TF_vs_DEgenes_14cluster_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10_pearsonColumnClustered.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(mat.correlation, 
                            name = "PCC",
                            column_title = "PCC correlation between DEG and TFs",
                            cluster_columns = TRUE,
                            #clustering_distance_columns = "pearson",
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            row_split = temp.split_instructions.new, 
                            show_row_names = TRUE,
                            show_column_names = TRUE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=3),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()
```
```{r correlation-heatmap-log2FC1.5DEG-log2FC-TF-log2FC-allcelltypes}
# calculate log2FC
expressed_genes=unique(c(expressed_gene_FRB,expressed_gene_MEL,expressed_gene_KRT))
CPM_PBS <- CPM_rna[expressed_genes,colnames(CPM_rna)[grepl("PBS",colnames(CPM_rna))]]
CPM_IFN <- CPM_rna[expressed_genes,colnames(CPM_rna)[grepl("IFN",colnames(CPM_rna))]]
log2FC <- log2(CPM_IFN + 1) - log2(CPM_PBS + 1) 
colnames(log2FC) <- gsub("_IFN","",colnames(log2FC))
log2FC <- na.omit(log2FC)

# pick tf from the gene list and with non-zero std deviation
tf <- data.table::fread("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/literature/Lambert_2018_human_TFs.txt",header=F) %>%
  dplyr::filter(V1 %in% rownames(log2FC)) %>%
  pull(V1) %>%
  unique()
temp <- apply(CPM_rna_DEG[tf,], 1, sd)
temp2 <- rownames(CPM_rna_DEG[tf,])[which(temp!=0)]
log2FC_TF <- log2FC[temp2,] %>% na.omit()
TF_list <- rownames(log2FC_TF)

# pick log2FC1.5 induced genes
gene_list <- intersect(rownames(km_res.rna.new), expressed_genes)
log2FC_genes <- log2FC[gene_list,] %>% na.omit()
gene_list <- rownames(log2FC_genes)
temp.split_instructions.new <- km_res.rna.new[gene_list,"newclass"]

# generate correlation matrix
mat.correlation <- matrix(nrow=length(gene_list), ncol=length(TF_list))
for (i in 1:length(gene_list)) {
  for (j in 1:length(TF_list)) {
    mat.correlation[i,j] <- cor(as.numeric(log2FC_genes[i,]), as.numeric(log2FC_TF[j,]) , method="pearson")
  }
}
rownames(mat.correlation) <- gene_list
colnames(mat.correlation) <- TF_list

# remove rows with standard deviation = 0
temp <- apply(mat.correlation, 2, sd)

# 
temp <- data.frame(gene=rownames(mat.correlation),pcc=mat.correlation[,"ELF3"]) %>% arrange(desc(pcc))
temp.genes <- temp[which(temp$pcc>0.8),"gene"]
write(temp.genes, paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/ELF3_highly_correlated_genes.txt"))

gene_lst=temp.genes
gene_lst_name="ELF3_highly_correlated_genes"

plot_list <- c()
for (i in 1:length(gene_lst)) {
  g <- gene_lst[i]
  p <- make_paired_plot(g,CPM_rna[g,])
  plot_list[[i]] <- p
}

pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/paired_plots_",gene_lst_name,".pdf"),width=15,height=8)
for (i in 1:length(plot_list)) {
  print(plot_list[[i]])
}
dev.off()


# plot heatmap of correlation matrix
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/correlation_heatmap_RNAseq_based-on-log2FC_allCellTypes_TF_vs_DEgenes_14cluster_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10_pearsonColumnClustered.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(mat.correlation, 
                            name = "PCC",
                            column_title = "PCC correlation between DEG and TFs",
                            cluster_columns = TRUE,
                            clustering_distance_columns = "pearson",
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            row_split = temp.split_instructions.new, 
                            show_row_names = TRUE,
                            show_column_names = TRUE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=3),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()
```
```{r correlation-of-PCC-acrosslog2FCinducedgenes-heatmap-TF-TF}
# first load log2FC1.5 heatmap .rdata
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(InteractiveComplexHeatmap)

# pick DE genes and TFs
TF_list=c("STAT1","STAT2","STAT3","STAT4","STAT5A","STAT5B","STAT6","NFKB1","NFKB2","RELA","RELB","REL","RUNX1","RUNX2","GATA2","GATA3","ATF1","ATF2","ATF3","ATF4","ATF5","ATF6","ATF6B","ATF7","BATF","BATF2","BATF3","IRF1","IRF2","IRF3","IRF4","IRF5","IRF6","IRF7","IRF8","IRF9","JUN","JUNB","JUND","FOS","FOSB","FOSL1","FOSL2","ETS1","ETS2","ERG","ETV3","ETV1","ETV4","KLF2","KLF3","KLF4","KLF5","KLF6","KLF8","KLF9","KLF10","KLF11","KLF12","KLF13","KLF15","KLF16","MAF","MAFA","MAFB","MAFF","MAFK","TEAD1","TEAD2","TEAD3","TEAD4","PRDM1","SOX1","SOX4","PRDM2","ELF1","ELF2","CBFB","FOXA1","AR")
gene_list=rownames(km_res.rna.new)
CPM_picked_genes <- CPM_rna[gene_list,]
CPM_TF <- CPM_rna[TF_list,]

# generate correlation matrix
mat.correlation <- matrix(nrow=length(gene_list), ncol=length(TF_list))
for (i in 1:length(gene_list)) {
  for (j in 1:length(TF_list)) {
    mat.correlation[i,j] <- cor(as.numeric(CPM_picked_genes[i,]), as.numeric(CPM_TF[j,]) , method="pearson")
  }
}
rownames(mat.correlation) <- gene_list
colnames(mat.correlation) <- TF_list

# generate correlation of correlation matrix
mat.correlation.of.pcc <- matrix(nrow=length(TF_list), ncol=length(TF_list))
for (i in 1:length(TF_list)) {
  for (j in 1:length(TF_list)) {
    mat.correlation.of.pcc[i,j] <- cor(as.numeric(mat.correlation[,i]), as.numeric(mat.correlation[,j]))
  }
}
rownames(mat.correlation.of.pcc) <- TF_list
colnames(mat.correlation.of.pcc) <- TF_list

# plot heatmap of correlation matrix
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/correlation_heatmap_RNAseq_TF_vs_TF_across_pcc_of_DEgenes_14clusters_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(mat.correlation.of.pcc, 
                            name = "PCC",
                            column_title = "PCC correlation between TFs across the PCC correlation with induced genes",
                            cluster_columns = TRUE,
                            cluster_rows = TRUE,
                            show_row_names = TRUE,
                            clustering_distance_rows = 'pearson',
                            clustering_distance_columns = 'pearson',
                            show_column_names = TRUE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
#htShiny(heatmap.rna)
dev.off()
```
```{r TF-paired-plots}
plot_list <- list()
for (i in 1:length(TF_list)) {
  g=TF_list[i]
  plot_list[[i]] <- make_paired_plot(g,CPM_rna[g,])
}
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/","paired_plot_TF",".pdf"),width=15,height=8)
for (i in 1:length(TF_list)) {
  print(plot_list[[i]])
}
dev.off()
```
## Keeping tally of human TFs
```{r TF-in-clusters}
library(dplyr)
library(magrittr)
library(tidyverse)
library(gplots)
library(ggfortify)
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
library(cowplot)
library(ggpubr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
tf <- data.table::fread("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/literature/Lambert_2018_human_TFs.txt",header=F) %>%
  dplyr::filter(V1 %in% rownames(km_res.rna.new)) %>%
  pull(V1)

zlogCPM.heatmap <- km_res.rna.new[,1:ncol(CPM_rna_DEG)]
zlogCPM.heatmap_with_gene <- zlogCPM.heatmap[tf,]
row_anno_index <- which(rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %in% rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap_with_gene))
row_anno_label <- rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap)[row_anno_index]

# 5. plot heatmap
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

row_ha = rowAnnotation(
  foo = anno_mark(at = row_anno_index, 
                  labels = row_anno_label,
                  which="row",
                  labels_gp = gpar(fontsize=10),
                  padding=unit(0.5,"mm")))

pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA/heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10_TF-labeled.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM.heatmap, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            right_annotation = row_ha,
                            column_title = "DE genes in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated, TF labeled",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("PBS_KRT",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("PBS_MEL",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("PBS_FRB",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("IFN_KRT",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("IFN_MEL",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("IFN_FRB",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions.new, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
```{r TF-tally}
#Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
#load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

tf <- data.table::fread("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/literature/Lambert_2018_human_TFs.txt",header=F) %>%
  dplyr::filter(V1 %in% rownames(CPM_rna)) %>%
  pull(V1) %>%
  unique()

CPM_tf <- CPM_rna[tf,]

# how many of them have expression in only one cell type
tf_means <- c()
for (i in 1:nrow(CPM_tf)) {
  mean.pbs.mel <- CPM_tf[i,grepl("PBS_MEL",colnames(CPM_tf))] %>% as.numeric() %>% mean()
  mean.pbs.frb <- CPM_tf[i,grepl("PBS_FRB",colnames(CPM_tf))] %>% as.numeric() %>% mean()
  mean.pbs.krt <- CPM_tf[i,grepl("PBS_KRT",colnames(CPM_tf))] %>% as.numeric() %>% mean()
  
  this.mean <- c(mean.pbs.frb, mean.pbs.mel, mean.pbs.krt)
  tf_means <- rbind(tf_means, this.mean)
}
colnames(tf_means) <- c("PBS_FRB", "PBS_MEL", "PBS_KRT")
rownames(tf_means) <- rownames(CPM_tf)
tf_means <- as.data.frame(tf_means)
tf_means$count_cpm10 <- unlist(rowSums(tf_means > 10))
tf_means$celltypes <- apply(tf_means[,1:3],1,function(x) c("FRB","MEL","KRT")[which(x > 10)]) %>% paste( . )

table(tf_means$count_cpm10)
table(tf_means$celltypes)
library("ggalluvial")
df.alluv <- data.frame(all=rep("human_TF",nrow(CPM_tf)),
                       expressed=c(rep("not expressed",762),
                                   rep("1 celltype",179),
                                   rep("2 celltypes",136),
                                   rep("3 celltypes",553)),
                       celltype=c(rep("NA",762),
                                  rep("1.MEL",67),
                                  rep("1.FRB",72),
                                  rep("1.KRT",40),
                                  rep("2.MEL_FRB",70),
                                  rep("2.MEL_KRT",25),
                                  rep("2.FRB_KRT",41),
                                  rep("3.all celltypes",553)))
ggplot(data = df.alluv,
       aes(axis1 = all, axis2 = expressed, axis3=celltype)) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("all", "expressed","celltype"), expand = c(.2, .05)) +
  xlab("TF") +
  geom_alluvium(aes(fill = celltype)) +
  geom_stratum() +
  geom_text(stat = "stratum", aes(label = after_stat(stratum))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  ggtitle("human TF expression in skin cells")

# among the expressed factors, how many of them are also induced?
dir.krt <- "~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/RNA-Seq/keratinocytes/pipeline_11192022/analysis"
dir.mel <- "~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/RNA-Seq/melanocytes/pipeline_12022022/analysis"
dir.frb <- "~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/RNA-Seq/fibroblasts/pipeline_11192022/analysis"
rna.res.krt <- read.table(paste0(dir.krt,"/DESeq2_results_IFNvsPBS.txt"),header=T,sep=" ") %>% na.omit()
rna.res.mel <- read.table(paste0(dir.mel,"/DESeq2_results_IFNvsPBS.txt"),header=T,sep=" ") %>% na.omit()
rna.res.frb <- read.table(paste0(dir.frb,"/DESeq2_results_IFNvsPBS.txt"),header=T,sep=" ") %>% na.omit()

induced.krt <- rna.res.krt %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% tf) %>% dplyr::filter(pvalue<0.05) %>% dplyr::filter(log2FoldChange > 1.5) %>% pull(gene)
induced.frb <- rna.res.frb %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% tf) %>% dplyr::filter(pvalue<0.05) %>% dplyr::filter(log2FoldChange > 1.5) %>% pull(gene)
induced.mel <- rna.res.mel %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% tf) %>% dplyr::filter(pvalue<0.05) %>% dplyr::filter(log2FoldChange > 1.5) %>% pull(gene)

df.krt <- data.frame(gene=induced.krt,celltype=rep("KRT",length(induced.krt)))
df.mel <- data.frame(gene=induced.mel,celltype=rep("MEL",length(induced.mel)))
df.frb <- data.frame(gene=induced.frb,celltype=rep("FRB",length(induced.frb)))

temp <- rbind(df.krt, df.mel, df.frb) %>%
  group_by(gene) %>% 
  summarize(celltype=paste(celltype,collapse=','))

df.expressed <- tf_means %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>% dplyr::select(c(gene,count_cpm10,celltypes)) %>%
  set_colnames(c("gene","expressed_celltypes_count","expressed_celltypes"))

df.induced <- rbind(df.krt, df.mel, df.frb) %>%
  group_by(gene) %>% 
  mutate(count=n()) %>%
  distinct_at( . , "gene", .keep_all=TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::select(-celltype) %>%
  left_join( . , temp, by="gene") 

df.expressed_induced <- left_join(df.expressed, df.induced, by="gene")

```
```{r TF-heatmap}
tf <- data.table::fread("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/literature/Lambert_2018_human_TFs.txt",header=F) %>%
  dplyr::filter(V1 %in% rownames(CPM_rna)) %>%
  pull(V1) %>%
  unique()

tf.expressed <- intersect(tf, rownames(CPM_rna_new))
tf.expressed.induced <- intersect(tf.expressed, rownames(CPM_rna_DEG))
```
## Heatmaps of ATACseq-promoter
```{r ATAC-promoter-all-genes-general-dynamics}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch promoters of all genes and scale
this.cpm <- CPM_atac[which(rownames(CPM_atac) %in% link_gene_promoter$promoter),]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)

# pick 5 clusters
df <- this.logCPM
wss <- (nrow(scale(df))-1)*sum(apply(scale(df),2,var))
for (i in 2:20) wss[i] <- sum(kmeans(scale(df),centers=i)$withinss)
plot(1:20, wss, type="b", xlab="Number of Clusters", ylab="Within groups sum of squares")
rm(df,wss)

# niceKmeans
km_res_atac_promoter <- niceKmeans(this.logCPM, 5)
split_instructions_atac_promoter <- c(rep(1,km_res_atac_promoter$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res_atac_promoter$breaks[2]-km_res_atac_promoter$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res_atac_promoter$breaks[3]-km_res_atac_promoter$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res_atac_promoter$breaks[4]-km_res_atac_promoter$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,nrow(km_res_atac_promoter$clustered)-km_res_atac_promoter$breaks[4]))
zlogCPM_atac_promoter <- km_res_atac_promoter$clustered[,1:ncol(this.logCPM)]

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_ATACseq_promoters_all-genes.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM_atac_promoter, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "ATACseq signal of all promoters in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter))]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions_atac_promoter, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
```{r ATAC-promoter-induced-genes-general-dynamics}
#Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
#load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch promoters of all genes and scale
induced.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna.new)
induced.genes.promoters <- link_gene_promoter[which(link_gene_promoter$gene %in% induced.genes),"promoter"]
this.cpm <- CPM_atac[which(rownames(CPM_atac) %in% induced.genes.promoters$promoter),]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)

# pick 5 clusters
df <- this.logCPM
wss <- (nrow(scale(df))-1)*sum(apply(scale(df),2,var))
for (i in 2:20) wss[i] <- sum(kmeans(scale(df),centers=i)$withinss)
plot(1:20, wss, type="b", xlab="Number of Clusters", ylab="Within groups sum of squares")
rm(df,wss)

# niceKmeans
km_res_atac_promoter <- niceKmeans(this.logCPM, 5)
split_instructions_atac_promoter <- c(rep(1,km_res_atac_promoter$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res_atac_promoter$breaks[2]-km_res_atac_promoter$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res_atac_promoter$breaks[3]-km_res_atac_promoter$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res_atac_promoter$breaks[4]-km_res_atac_promoter$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,nrow(km_res_atac_promoter$clustered)-km_res_atac_promoter$breaks[4]))
zlogCPM_atac_promoter <- km_res_atac_promoter$clustered[,1:ncol(this.logCPM)]

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_ATACseq_promoters_induced-genes_5kmm.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM_atac_promoter, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "ATACseq signal of all promoters in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_promoter))]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions_atac_promoter, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
```{r ATAC-promoter-induced-genes-cluster-matched}
#Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
#load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch promoters of all genes and scale
induced.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna.new)
induced.genes.cluster <- data.frame(gene=induced.genes,
                                    cluster=km_res.rna.new$newclass) %>%
  dplyr::filter(gene %in% link_gene_promoter$gene)
induced.genes.and.promoter <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:nrow(induced.genes.cluster)) {
  this.promoter <- unique(link_gene_promoter[which(link_gene_promoter$gene==induced.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"promoter"])
  this.promoter.cluster <- induced.genes.cluster[which(induced.genes.cluster$gene==induced.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"cluster"]
    this.promoter.df <- data.frame(gene=rep(induced.genes.cluster$gene[i],length(this.promoter)),
                                   promoter=this.promoter,
                                   cluster=rep(this.promoter.cluster,length(this.promoter)))
    induced.genes.and.promoter <- rbind(induced.genes.and.promoter, this.promoter.df)
}

this.cpm <- CPM_atac[induced.genes.and.promoter$promoter,]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)
this.zlogCPM <- t(scale(t(this.logCPM)))

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_14cluster_ATACseq_promoters_induced-genes_gene-cluster-matched.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

heatmap.atac <- draw(Heatmap(this.zlogCPM, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "ATACseq signal of all promoters in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))]))),
                            row_split = induced.genes.and.promoter$cluster, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(1, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
## Heatmaps of ATACseq-enhancer
```{r ATAC-enhancer-all-genes-general-dynamics}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))
# fetch enhancers of all genes and scale
this.cpm <- CPM_atac[which(rownames(CPM_atac) %in% link_gene_enhancer$enhancer),]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)

# pick 5 clusters
df <- this.logCPM
wss <- (nrow(scale(df))-1)*sum(apply(scale(df),2,var))
for (i in 2:20) wss[i] <- sum(kmeans(scale(df),centers=i)$withinss)
plot(1:20, wss, type="b", xlab="Number of Clusters", ylab="Within groups sum of squares")
rm(df,wss)

# niceKmeans
km_res_atac_enhancer <- niceKmeans(this.logCPM, 5)
split_instructions_atac_enhancer <- c(rep(1,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[2]-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[3]-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[4]-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,nrow(km_res_atac_enhancer$clustered)-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[4]))
zlogCPM_atac_enhancer <- km_res_atac_enhancer$clustered[,1:ncol(this.logCPM)]

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_ATACseq_enhancers_all-genes.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "ATACseq signal of all enhancers in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions_atac_enhancer, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
```{r ATAC-enhancer-induced-genes-general-dynamics}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch enhancers of all genes and scale
induced.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna.new)
induced.genes.enhancers <- link_gene_enhancer[which(link_gene_enhancer$gene %in% induced.genes),"enhancer"]
this.cpm <- CPM_atac[which(rownames(CPM_atac) %in% induced.genes.enhancers$enhancer),]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)

# pick 5 clusters
df <- this.logCPM
wss <- (nrow(scale(df))-1)*sum(apply(scale(df),2,var))
for (i in 2:20) wss[i] <- sum(kmeans(scale(df),centers=i)$withinss)
plot(1:20, wss, type="b", xlab="Number of Clusters", ylab="Within groups sum of squares")
rm(df,wss)

# niceKmeans
km_res_atac_enhancer <- niceKmeans(this.logCPM, 5)
split_instructions_atac_enhancer <- c(rep(1,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[2]-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[3]-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[4]-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,nrow(km_res_atac_enhancer$clustered)-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[4]))
zlogCPM_atac_enhancer <- km_res_atac_enhancer$clustered[,1:ncol(this.logCPM)]

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_ATACseq_enhancers_induced-genes_5kmm.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "ATACseq signal of all enhancers in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions_atac_enhancer, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
```{r ATAC-enhancer-induced-genes-cluster-matched}
#Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
#load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch enhancers of all genes and scale
induced.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna.new)
induced.genes.cluster <- data.frame(gene=induced.genes,
                                    cluster=km_res.rna.new$newclass) %>%
  dplyr::filter(gene %in% link_gene_enhancer$gene)
induced.genes.and.enhancer <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:nrow(induced.genes.cluster)) {
  this.enhancer <- unique(link_gene_enhancer[which(link_gene_enhancer$gene==induced.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"enhancer"])
  this.enhancer.cluster <- induced.genes.cluster[which(induced.genes.cluster$gene==induced.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"cluster"]
    this.enhancer.df <- data.frame(gene=rep(induced.genes.cluster$gene[i],length(this.enhancer)),
                                   enhancer=this.enhancer,
                                   cluster=rep(this.enhancer.cluster,length(this.enhancer)))
    induced.genes.and.enhancer <- rbind(induced.genes.and.enhancer, this.enhancer.df)
}

this.cpm <- CPM_atac[induced.genes.and.enhancer$enhancer,]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)
this.zlogCPM <- t(scale(t(this.logCPM)))

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_14cluster_ATACseq_enhancers_induced-genes_gene-cluster-matched.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

heatmap.atac <- draw(Heatmap(this.zlogCPM, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "ATACseq signal of all enhancers in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))]))),
                            row_split = induced.genes.and.enhancer$cluster, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(1, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
```{r ATAC-enhancer-clustered-within-gene-cluster}
#Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
#load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch enhancers of all genes and scale
make_enhancer_ATACseq_heatmap_for_this_cluster <- function(clusterN) {
  #clusterN <- 1
  this.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna.new[which(km_res.rna.new$newclass==clusterN),])
  this.genes.cluster <- data.frame(gene=this.genes,
                                   cluster=clusterN) %>%
    dplyr::filter(gene %in% link_gene_enhancer$gene)
  this.genes.and.enhancer <- data.frame()
  for (i in 1:nrow(this.genes.cluster)) {
    this.enhancer <- unique(link_gene_enhancer[which(link_gene_enhancer$gene==this.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"enhancer"])
    this.enhancer.cluster <- this.genes.cluster[which(this.genes.cluster$gene==this.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"cluster"]
    this.enhancer.df <- data.frame(gene=rep(this.genes.cluster$gene[i],length(this.enhancer)),
                                   enhancer=this.enhancer,
                                   cluster=rep(this.enhancer.cluster,length(this.enhancer)))
    this.genes.and.enhancer <- rbind(this.genes.and.enhancer, this.enhancer.df)
  }
  
  this.cpm <- CPM_atac[this.genes.and.enhancer$enhancer,]
  this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)
  
  # pick 5 clusters with niceKmeans
  km_res_atac_enhancer <- niceKmeans(this.logCPM, 5)
  split_instructions_atac_enhancer <- c(rep(1,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[1]), 
                                        rep(2,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[2]-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[1]),
                                        rep(3,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[3]-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[2]),
                                        rep(4,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[4]-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[3]),
                                        rep(5,nrow(km_res_atac_enhancer$clustered)-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[4]))
  zlogCPM_atac_enhancer <- km_res_atac_enhancer$clustered[,1:ncol(this.logCPM)]
  
  # heatmap
  pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_14cluster_ATACseq_enhancers_of_gene_cluster_",as.character(clusterN),".pdf"),width=24,height=30)
  column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
    condition = colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer) %>%
```
