```{r ATAC-enhancer-clustered-within-gene-cluster}
      lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
    celltype = colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer) %>% 
      lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
    col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
               celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
    show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))
  
  heatmap.atac <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer, 
                               name = "z-score log2CPM",
                               top_annotation = column_ha,
                               column_title = paste0("ATACseq signal of enhancers of gene cluster ",as.character(clusterN)),
                               cluster_columns = FALSE,
                               cluster_rows = FALSE,
                               column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                                rep(2,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                                rep(3,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                                rep(4,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                                rep(5,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])),
                                                rep(6,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))]))),
                               row_split = split_instructions_atac_enhancer, 
                               show_row_names = FALSE,
                               row_title_rot = 0,
                               column_names_rot = 45,
                               row_gap = unit(5, "mm"),
                               border = TRUE,
                               column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                               column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                               row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
  dev.off()
}

for (i in 1:14){
  make_enhancer_ATACseq_heatmap_for_this_cluster(i)
}
```
```{r refined-ATAC-enhancer-clustered-within-gene-cluster-melanocyte-cts-only}
#Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
#load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch enhancers of all melanocyte cts induced genes

#clusterN <- 1
this.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna.new[which(km_res.rna.new$newclass %in% c(4,8,9,10,11,12)),])
this.genes.cluster <- data.frame(gene=this.genes,
                                 cluster=km_res.rna.new[this.genes,]$newclass) %>%
  dplyr::filter(gene %in% link_gene_enhancer$gene)
this.genes.and.enhancer <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:nrow(this.genes.cluster)) {
  this.enhancer <- unique(link_gene_enhancer[which(link_gene_enhancer$gene==this.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"enhancer"])
  this.enhancer.cluster <- this.genes.cluster[which(this.genes.cluster$gene==this.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"cluster"]
  this.enhancer.df <- data.frame(gene=rep(this.genes.cluster$gene[i],length(this.enhancer)),
                                 enhancer=this.enhancer,
                                 cluster=rep(this.enhancer.cluster,length(this.enhancer)))
  this.genes.and.enhancer <- rbind(this.genes.and.enhancer, this.enhancer.df)
}

this.cpm <- CPM_atac[this.genes.and.enhancer$enhancer,]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)

# pick 5 clusters with niceKmeans
km_res_atac_enhancer <- niceKmeans(this.logCPM, 5)
split_instructions_atac_enhancer <- c(rep(1,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[1]), 
                                      rep(2,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[2]-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[1]),
                                      rep(3,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[3]-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[2]),
                                      rep(4,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[4]-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[3]),
                                      rep(5,nrow(km_res_atac_enhancer$clustered)-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[4]))
zlogCPM_atac_enhancer <- km_res_atac_enhancer$clustered[,1:ncol(this.logCPM)]

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_14cluster_ATACseq_enhancers_of_MEL-cts-induced_gene_cluster_4+8+9+10+11+12.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

heatmap.atac <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer, 
                             name = "z-score log2CPM",
                             top_annotation = column_ha,
                             column_title = paste0("ATACseq signal of enhancers of gene cluster 4+8+9+10+11+12"),
                             cluster_columns = FALSE,
                             cluster_rows = FALSE,
                             column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                              rep(2,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                              rep(3,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                              rep(4,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                              rep(5,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])),
                                              rep(6,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))]))),
                             row_split = split_instructions_atac_enhancer, 
                             show_row_names = FALSE,
                             row_title_rot = 0,
                             column_names_rot = 45,
                             row_gap = unit(5, "mm"),
                             border = TRUE,
                             column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                             column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                             row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

# heatmap shows enhancers in cluster 4 correspond to the ones that gain accessibility upon IFNg in MEL. But also it also involves gaining in FRB?
#induced_enhancers <- km_res_atac_enhancer$clustered %>% dplyr::filter(class=="4") %>% rownames_to_column("enhancer") %>% pull(enhancer)
#write(induced_enhancers, paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/induced_enhancers_of_cts_induced_MEL.txt"))
```
```{r refined-ATAC-enhancer-clustered-within-gene-cluster-keratinocyte-cts-only}
#Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
#load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch enhancers of all melanocyte cts induced genes

#clusterN <- 1
this.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna.new[which(km_res.rna.new$newclass %in% c(6,7)),])
this.genes.cluster <- data.frame(gene=this.genes,
                                 cluster=km_res.rna.new[this.genes,]$newclass) %>%
  dplyr::filter(gene %in% link_gene_enhancer$gene)
this.genes.and.enhancer <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:nrow(this.genes.cluster)) {
  this.enhancer <- unique(link_gene_enhancer[which(link_gene_enhancer$gene==this.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"enhancer"])
  this.enhancer.cluster <- this.genes.cluster[which(this.genes.cluster$gene==this.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"cluster"]
  this.enhancer.df <- data.frame(gene=rep(this.genes.cluster$gene[i],length(this.enhancer)),
                                 enhancer=this.enhancer,
                                 cluster=rep(this.enhancer.cluster,length(this.enhancer)))
  this.genes.and.enhancer <- rbind(this.genes.and.enhancer, this.enhancer.df)
}

this.cpm <- CPM_atac[this.genes.and.enhancer$enhancer,]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)

# pick 5 clusters with niceKmeans
km_res_atac_enhancer <- niceKmeans(this.logCPM, 5)
split_instructions_atac_enhancer <- c(rep(1,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[1]), 
                                      rep(2,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[2]-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[1]),
                                      rep(3,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[3]-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[2]),
                                      rep(4,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[4]-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[3]),
                                      rep(5,nrow(km_res_atac_enhancer$clustered)-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[4]))
zlogCPM_atac_enhancer <- km_res_atac_enhancer$clustered[,1:ncol(this.logCPM)]

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_14cluster_ATACseq_enhancers_of_KRT-cts-induced_gene_cluster_6+7.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

heatmap.atac <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer, 
                             name = "z-score log2CPM",
                             top_annotation = column_ha,
                             column_title = paste0("ATACseq signal of enhancers of gene cluster 6+7"),
                             cluster_columns = FALSE,
                             cluster_rows = FALSE,
                             column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                              rep(2,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                              rep(3,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                              rep(4,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                              rep(5,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])),
                                              rep(6,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))]))),
                             row_split = split_instructions_atac_enhancer, 
                             show_row_names = FALSE,
                             row_title_rot = 0,
                             column_names_rot = 45,
                             row_gap = unit(5, "mm"),
                             border = TRUE,
                             column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                             column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                             row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

# heatmap shows enhancers in cluster 5 correspond to the ones that gain accessibility upon IFNg in MEL. But also it also involves gaining in FRB?
#induced_enhancers <- km_res_atac_enhancer$clustered %>% dplyr::filter(class=="5") %>% rownames_to_column("enhancer") %>% pull(enhancer)
#write(induced_enhancers, paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/induced_enhancers_of_cts_induced_KRT.txt"))
```
```{r UNUSED-ATAC-MEL-enhancer-clustered-within-gene-cluster}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch enhancers of all genes and scale
make_MEL_enhancer_ATACseq_heatmap_for_this_cluster <- function(clusterN) {
  #clusterN <- 1
  this.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna.new[which(km_res.rna.new$newclass==clusterN),])
  this.genes.cluster <- data.frame(gene=this.genes,
                                   cluster=clusterN) %>%
    dplyr::filter(gene %in% link_gene_enhancer[which(link_gene_enhancer$celltype=="MEL"),]$gene) 
  this.genes.and.enhancer <- data.frame()
  for (i in 1:nrow(this.genes.cluster)) {
    this.enhancer <- unique(link_gene_enhancer[which(link_gene_enhancer$gene==this.genes.cluster$gene[i] & link_gene_enhancer$celltype=="MEL"),"enhancer"])
    this.enhancer.cluster <- this.genes.cluster[which(this.genes.cluster$gene==this.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"cluster"]
    this.enhancer.df <- data.frame(gene=rep(this.genes.cluster$gene[i],length(this.enhancer)),
                                   enhancer=this.enhancer,
                                   cluster=rep(this.enhancer.cluster,length(this.enhancer)))
    this.genes.and.enhancer <- rbind(this.genes.and.enhancer, this.enhancer.df)
  }
  
  this.cpm <- CPM_atac[this.genes.and.enhancer$enhancer,]
  this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)
  
  # pick 5 clusters with niceKmeans
  km_res_atac_enhancer <- niceKmeans(this.logCPM, 5)
  split_instructions_atac_enhancer <- c(rep(1,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[1]), 
                                        rep(2,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[2]-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[1]),
                                        rep(3,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[3]-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[2]),
                                        rep(4,km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[4]-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[3]),
                                        rep(5,nrow(km_res_atac_enhancer$clustered)-km_res_atac_enhancer$breaks[4]))
  zlogCPM_atac_enhancer <- km_res_atac_enhancer$clustered[,1:ncol(this.logCPM)]
  
  # heatmap
  pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_14cluster_ATACseq_MEL-enhancers_of_gene_cluster_",as.character(clusterN),".pdf"),width=24,height=30)
  column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
    condition = colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer) %>% 
      lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
    celltype = colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer) %>% 
      lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
    col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
               celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
    show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))
  
  heatmap.atac <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer, 
                               name = "z-score log2CPM",
                               top_annotation = column_ha,
                               column_title = paste0("ATACseq signal of enhancers of gene cluster ",as.character(clusterN)),
                               cluster_columns = FALSE,
                               cluster_rows = FALSE,
                               column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                                rep(2,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                                rep(3,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                                rep(4,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                                rep(5,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])),
                                                rep(6,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))]))),
                               row_split = split_instructions_atac_enhancer, 
                               show_row_names = FALSE,
                               row_title_rot = 0,
                               column_names_rot = 45,
                               row_gap = unit(5, "mm"),
                               border = TRUE,
                               column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                               column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                               row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
  dev.off()
}

for (i in 9:12){
  make_MEL_enhancer_ATACseq_heatmap_for_this_cluster(i)
}
```
## Heatmaps of ChIPseq-promoter
```{r ChIP-promoter-all-genes-general-dynamics}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch promoters of all genes and scale
this.cpm <- CPM_chip[which(rownames(CPM_chip) %in% link_gene_promoter$promoter),]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)

# pick 5 clusters
df <- this.logCPM
wss <- (nrow(scale(df))-1)*sum(apply(scale(df),2,var))
for (i in 2:20) wss[i] <- sum(kmeans(scale(df),centers=i)$withinss)
plot(1:20, wss, type="b", xlab="Number of Clusters", ylab="Within groups sum of squares")
rm(df,wss)

# niceKmeans
km_res_chip_promoter <- niceKmeans(this.logCPM, 5)
split_instructions_chip_promoter <- c(rep(1,km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[2]-km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[3]-km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[4]-km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,nrow(km_res_chip_promoter$clustered)-km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[4]))
this.zlogCPM <- km_res_chip_promoter$clustered[,1:ncol(this.logCPM)]

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_ChIPseq_promoters_all-genes.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(this.zlogCPM, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "chipseq signal of all promoters in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions_chip_promoter, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
```{r ChIPseq-promoter-induced-genes-general-dynamics}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch promoters of all genes and scale
induced.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna.new)
induced.genes.promoters <- link_gene_promoter[which(link_gene_promoter$gene %in% induced.genes),"promoter"]
this.cpm <- CPM_chip[which(rownames(CPM_chip) %in% induced.genes.promoters$promoter),]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)

# pick 5 clusters
df <- this.logCPM
wss <- (nrow(scale(df))-1)*sum(apply(scale(df),2,var))
for (i in 2:20) wss[i] <- sum(kmeans(scale(df),centers=i)$withinss)
plot(1:20, wss, type="b", xlab="Number of Clusters", ylab="Within groups sum of squares")
rm(df,wss)

# niceKmeans
km_res_chip_promoter <- niceKmeans(this.logCPM, 5)
split_instructions_chip_promoter <- c(rep(1,km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[2]-km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[3]-km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[4]-km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,nrow(km_res_chip_promoter$clustered)-km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[4]))
this.zlogCPM <- km_res_chip_promoter$clustered[,1:ncol(this.logCPM)]

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_chipseq_promoters_induced-genes_5kmm.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(this.zlogCPM, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "chipseq signal of all promoters in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions_chip_promoter, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
```{r ChIPseq-promoter-induced-genes-cluster-matched}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch promoters of all genes and scale
induced.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna.new)
induced.genes.cluster <- data.frame(gene=induced.genes,
                                    cluster=km_res.rna.new$newclass) %>%
  dplyr::filter(gene %in% link_gene_promoter$gene)
induced.genes.and.promoter <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:nrow(induced.genes.cluster)) {
  this.promoter <- unique(link_gene_promoter[which(link_gene_promoter$gene==induced.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"promoter"])
  this.promoter.cluster <- induced.genes.cluster[which(induced.genes.cluster$gene==induced.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"cluster"]
    this.promoter.df <- data.frame(gene=rep(induced.genes.cluster$gene[i],length(this.promoter)),
                                   promoter=this.promoter,
                                   cluster=rep(this.promoter.cluster,length(this.promoter)))
    induced.genes.and.promoter <- rbind(induced.genes.and.promoter, this.promoter.df)
}

this.cpm <- CPM_chip[induced.genes.and.promoter$promoter,]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)
this.zlogCPM <- t(scale(t(this.logCPM)))

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_14cluster_ChIPseq_promoters_induced-genes_gene-cluster-matched.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

heatmap.chip <- draw(Heatmap(this.zlogCPM, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "chipseq signal of all promoters in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))]))),
                            row_split = induced.genes.and.promoter$cluster, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(1, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
## Heatmaps of ChIPseq-enhancer
```{r ChIPseq-enhancer-all-genes-general-dynamics}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch enhancers of all genes and scale
this.cpm <- CPM_chip[which(rownames(CPM_chip) %in% link_gene_enhancer$enhancer),]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)

# pick 5 clusters
df <- this.logCPM
wss <- (nrow(scale(df))-1)*sum(apply(scale(df),2,var))
for (i in 2:20) wss[i] <- sum(kmeans(scale(df),centers=i)$withinss)
plot(1:20, wss, type="b", xlab="Number of Clusters", ylab="Within groups sum of squares")
rm(df,wss)

# niceKmeans
km_res_chip_enhancer <- niceKmeans(this.logCPM, 5)
split_instructions_chip_enhancer <- c(rep(1,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[2]-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[3]-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[4]-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,nrow(km_res_chip_enhancer$clustered)-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[4]))
this.zlogCPM <- km_res_chip_enhancer$clustered[,1:ncol(this.logCPM)]

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_ChIPseq_enhancers_all-genes.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(this.zlogCPM, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "H3K27ac ChIPseq signal of all enhancers in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions_chip_enhancer, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
```{r ChIPseq-enhancer-induced-genes-general-dynamics}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch enhancers of all genes and scale
induced.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna.new)
induced.genes.enhancers <- link_gene_enhancer[which(link_gene_enhancer$gene %in% induced.genes),"enhancer"]
this.cpm <- CPM_chip[which(rownames(CPM_chip) %in% induced.genes.enhancers$enhancer),]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)

# pick 5 clusters
df <- this.logCPM
wss <- (nrow(scale(df))-1)*sum(apply(scale(df),2,var))
for (i in 2:20) wss[i] <- sum(kmeans(scale(df),centers=i)$withinss)
plot(1:20, wss, type="b", xlab="Number of Clusters", ylab="Within groups sum of squares")
rm(df,wss)

# niceKmeans
km_res_chip_enhancer <- niceKmeans(this.logCPM, 5)
split_instructions_chip_enhancer <- c(rep(1,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[2]-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[3]-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[4]-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,nrow(km_res_chip_enhancer$clustered)-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[4]))
this.zlogCPM <- km_res_chip_enhancer$clustered[,1:ncol(this.logCPM)]

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_ChIPseq_enhancers_induced-genes_5kmm.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(this.zlogCPM, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "chipseq signal of all enhancers in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions_chip_enhancer, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
```{r ChIPseq-enhancer-induced-genes-cluster-matched}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch enhancers of all genes and scale
induced.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna.new)
induced.genes.cluster <- data.frame(gene=induced.genes,
                                    cluster=km_res.rna.new$newclass) %>%
  dplyr::filter(gene %in% link_gene_enhancer$gene)
induced.genes.and.enhancer <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:nrow(induced.genes.cluster)) {
  this.enhancer <- unique(link_gene_enhancer[which(link_gene_enhancer$gene==induced.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"enhancer"])
  this.enhancer.cluster <- induced.genes.cluster[which(induced.genes.cluster$gene==induced.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"cluster"]
    this.enhancer.df <- data.frame(gene=rep(induced.genes.cluster$gene[i],length(this.enhancer)),
                                   enhancer=this.enhancer,
                                   cluster=rep(this.enhancer.cluster,length(this.enhancer)))
    induced.genes.and.enhancer <- rbind(induced.genes.and.enhancer, this.enhancer.df)
}

this.cpm <- CPM_chip[induced.genes.and.enhancer$enhancer,]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)
this.zlogCPM <- t(scale(t(this.logCPM)))

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_14cluster_ChIPseq_enhancers_induced-genes_gene-cluster-matched.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

heatmap.chip <- draw(Heatmap(this.zlogCPM, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "chipseq signal of all enhancers in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))]))),
                            row_split = induced.genes.and.enhancer$cluster, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(1, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
```{r ChIP-enhancer-clustered-within-gene-cluster}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch enhancers of all genes and scale
make_enhancer_ChIPseq_heatmap_for_this_cluster <- function(clusterN) {
  #clusterN <- 1
  this.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna.new[which(km_res.rna.new$newclass==clusterN),])
  this.genes.cluster <- data.frame(gene=this.genes,
                                   cluster=clusterN) %>%
    dplyr::filter(gene %in% link_gene_enhancer$gene)
  this.genes.and.enhancer <- data.frame()
  for (i in 1:nrow(this.genes.cluster)) {
    this.enhancer <- unique(link_gene_enhancer[which(link_gene_enhancer$gene==this.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"enhancer"])
    this.enhancer.cluster <- this.genes.cluster[which(this.genes.cluster$gene==this.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"cluster"]
    this.enhancer.df <- data.frame(gene=rep(this.genes.cluster$gene[i],length(this.enhancer)),
                                   enhancer=this.enhancer,
                                   cluster=rep(this.enhancer.cluster,length(this.enhancer)))
    this.genes.and.enhancer <- rbind(this.genes.and.enhancer, this.enhancer.df)
  }
  
  this.cpm <- CPM_chip[this.genes.and.enhancer$enhancer,]
  this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)
  
  # pick 5 clusters with niceKmeans
  km_res_chip_enhancer <- niceKmeans(this.logCPM, 5)
  split_instructions_chip_enhancer <- c(rep(1,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[1]), 
                                        rep(2,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[2]-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[1]),
                                        rep(3,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[3]-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[2]),
                                        rep(4,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[4]-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[3]),
                                        rep(5,nrow(km_res_chip_enhancer$clustered)-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[4]))
  zlogCPM_chip_enhancer <- km_res_chip_enhancer$clustered[,1:ncol(this.logCPM)]
  
  # heatmap
  pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_14cluster_ChIPseq_enhancers_of_gene_cluster_",as.character(clusterN),".pdf"),width=24,height=30)
  column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
    condition = colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer) %>% 
      lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
    celltype = colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer) %>% 
      lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
    col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
               celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
    show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))
  
  heatmap.chip <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer, 
                               name = "z-score log2CPM",
                               top_annotation = column_ha,
                               column_title = paste0("ChIPseq signal of enhancers of gene cluster ",as.character(clusterN)),
                               cluster_columns = FALSE,
                               cluster_rows = FALSE,
                               column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])), 
                                                rep(2,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])), 
                                                rep(3,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])), 
                                                rep(4,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])), 
                                                rep(5,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])),
                                                rep(6,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))]))),
                               row_split = split_instructions_chip_enhancer, 
                               show_row_names = FALSE,
                               row_title_rot = 0,
                               column_names_rot = 45,
                               row_gap = unit(5, "mm"),
                               border = TRUE,
                               column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                               column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                               row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
  dev.off()
}

for (i in 1:14){
  make_enhancer_ChIPseq_heatmap_for_this_cluster(i)
}
```
























## Prune promoter list and plot Heatmaps of ATACseq and ChIPseq
```{r prune-promoter}
#Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
#load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch promoters of all genes and scale
induced.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna.new)
induced.genes.cluster <- data.frame(gene=induced.genes,
                                    cluster=km_res.rna.new$newclass) %>%
  dplyr::filter(gene %in% link_gene_promoter$gene)
induced.genes.and.promoter <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:nrow(induced.genes.cluster)) {
  this.promoter <- unlist(unique(link_gene_promoter[which(link_gene_promoter$gene==induced.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"promoter"]))
  if (length(this.promoter)>1) {
    # fetch all promoter CPM
    this.promoter.cpm <- CPM_chip[this.promoter,]
    colnames(this.promoter.cpm) <- data.frame(samples=colnames(this.promoter.cpm)) %>% 
      tidyr::separate( . , col=samples, into=c("a","b","c"),sep="_") %>%
      mutate(newname = paste(a,c,b,sep="_")) %>% pull(newname)
    # fetch gene expression CPM
    this.gene.cpm <- CPM_rna[induced.genes.cluster$gene[i], colnames(this.promoter.cpm)]
    # calculate corrleation
    PCCs <- data.frame(promoter=rownames(this.promoter.cpm))
    for (j in 1:length(this.promoter)){
      PCCs$value[j] = cor(as.numeric(this.promoter.cpm[j, ]), as.numeric(this.gene.cpm), method="pearson")
    }
    # top promoter
    PCCs <- PCCs %>% arrange(-value)
    top.promoter <- PCCs[1, "promoter"]
  }
  else {
    top.promoter <- this.promoter
  }
  top.promoter.cluster <- induced.genes.cluster[which(induced.genes.cluster$gene==induced.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"cluster"]
  top.promoter.df <- data.frame(gene=induced.genes.cluster$gene[i],
                                promoter=top.promoter,
                                cluster=top.promoter.cluster)
  induced.genes.and.promoter <- rbind(induced.genes.and.promoter, top.promoter.df)
}


# save pruned promoter as dictionary
#temp1 <- link_gene_promoter %>% mutate(tag=paste(gene,promoter,sep="_"))
#temp2 <- induced.genes.and.promoter %>% mutate(tag=paste(gene,promoter,sep="_"))
#temp3 <- temp1 %>% dplyr::filter(tag %in% temp2$tag) %>% dplyr::select(-tag)
#data.table::fwrite(temp3,"~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/chromatin/RegulatoryElements/method3/dictionary_induced_gene_pruned_promoter_links_allcts.txt",col.names=F, row.names=F, quote=F, sep="\t")
```
```{r heatmap-ATACseq-pruned-promoter}
this.cpm <- CPM_atac[induced.genes.and.promoter$promoter,]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)
this.zlogCPM <- t(scale(t(this.logCPM)))

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_14cluster_ATACseq_pruned-promoters_induced-genes_gene-cluster-matched.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

heatmap.atac <- draw(Heatmap(this.zlogCPM, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "ATACseq signal of top promoters for each inducible gene in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))]))),
                            row_split = induced.genes.and.promoter$cluster, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(1, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()
```
```{r heatmap-ChIPseq-pruned-promoter}
this.cpm <- CPM_chip[induced.genes.and.promoter$promoter,]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)
this.zlogCPM <- t(scale(t(this.logCPM)))

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_14cluster_ChIPseq_pruned-promoters_induced-genes_gene-cluster-matched.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

heatmap.atac <- draw(Heatmap(this.zlogCPM, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "ChIPseq signal of top promoters for each inducible gene in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(this.zlogCPM)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(this.zlogCPM))]))),
                            row_split = induced.genes.and.promoter$cluster, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(1, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()
```
## Box-plot of enhancer counts per cluster
```{r boxplot-enhancer-count}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch enhancers of all induced genes
induced.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna.new)
induced.genes.with.enhancer <- data.frame(gene=induced.genes,
                                          cluster=km_res.rna.new$newclass) %>%
  dplyr::filter(gene %in% link_gene_enhancer$gene)

# compile enhancer count table
for (i in 1:nrow(induced.genes.with.enhancer)) {
  this.enhancer <- link_gene_enhancer[which(link_gene_enhancer$gene==induced.genes.with.enhancer$gene[i]),c("enhancer","celltype")]
  induced.genes.with.enhancer$enhancer_count_KRT[i] <- nrow(this.enhancer[which(this.enhancer$celltype=="KRT"),])
  induced.genes.with.enhancer$enhancer_count_FRB[i] <- nrow(this.enhancer[which(this.enhancer$celltype=="FRB"),])
  induced.genes.with.enhancer$enhancer_count_MEL[i] <- nrow(this.enhancer[which(this.enhancer$celltype=="MEL"),])
}
induced.genes.with.enhancer.long <- induced.genes.with.enhancer %>% 
  pivot_longer( . , c("enhancer_count_KRT","enhancer_count_MEL","enhancer_count_FRB"), names_to="celltype", values_to = "enhancer_count") %>%
  mutate(celltype=gsub("enhancer_count_","",.$celltype))
induced.genes.with.enhancer.long$celltype <- ordered(induced.genes.with.enhancer.long$celltype, levels=c("KRT","MEL","FRB"))

# violin plot
# make violin plot
p <- ggplot(induced.genes.with.enhancer.long, aes(factor(cluster), enhancer_count)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill=factor(celltype)),outlier.shape = NA)  +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 30)) 
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/boxplot_enhancerCount_14clusters.pdf"), width=24, height=8)
p
dev.off()

```
## Box-plot of enhancer sharing frequency per cluster
```{r boxplot-enhancer-sharing}
#Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
#load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_04182023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch enhancers of all induced genes
induced.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna.new)
induced.genes.with.enhancer <- data.frame(gene=induced.genes,
                                          cluster=km_res.rna.new$newclass) %>%
  dplyr::filter(gene %in% link_gene_enhancer$gene)


# compile enhancer count table
enhancer_sharing_table <- data.frame()
link_gene_enhancer <- link_gene_enhancer %>% arrange(celltype)
for (i in 1:nrow(induced.genes.with.enhancer)) {
  this.enhancer <- link_gene_enhancer %>%
    dplyr::filter(gene==induced.genes.with.enhancer$gene[i]) %>%
    dplyr::select(c("enhancer","celltype")) %>%
    group_by(enhancer) %>% 
    summarize(celltype=paste(celltype,collapse=','))

  this.shared <- c()
  this.shared[1] <- this.enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(celltype=="FRB") %>% nrow()
  this.shared[2] <- this.enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(celltype=="KRT") %>% nrow()
  this.shared[3] <- this.enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(celltype=="MEL") %>% nrow()
  this.shared[4] <- this.enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(celltype=="FRB,KRT") %>% nrow()
  this.shared[5] <- this.enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(celltype=="FRB,MEL") %>% nrow()
  this.shared[6] <- this.enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(celltype=="KRT,MEL") %>% nrow()
  this.shared[7] <- this.enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(celltype=="FRB,KRT,MEL") %>% nrow()
  this.shared[8] <- nrow(this.enhancer)
  this.shared[9] <- induced.genes.with.enhancer$gene[i]
  enhancer_sharing_table <- rbind(enhancer_sharing_table, this.shared)
}
colnames(enhancer_sharing_table) <- c("FRB", "KRT", "MEL", "FRB_KRT", "FRB_MEL", "KRT_MEL", "FRB_KRT_MEL","total_enhancers_of_this_gene","gene")

# compile enhancer sharing frequency table
enhancer_sharing_frequency_table <- data.frame()
link_gene_enhancer <- link_gene_enhancer %>% arrange(celltype)
for (i in 1:nrow(induced.genes.with.enhancer)) {
  
  this.enhancer <- link_gene_enhancer %>%
    dplyr::filter(gene==induced.genes.with.enhancer$gene[i]) %>%
    dplyr::select(c("enhancer","celltype")) %>%
    group_by(enhancer) %>% 
    summarize(celltype=paste(celltype,collapse=','))
  this.shared <- c()
  totalcount <- as.numeric(enhancer_sharing_table[i,"total_enhancers_of_this_gene"])
  this.row <- as.numeric(enhancer_sharing_table[i,1:7])
  this.row.frequency <- round(this.row/totalcount*100,0)
  this.shared[1:7] <- this.row.frequency
  this.shared[8] <- induced.genes.with.enhancer$gene[i]
  enhancer_sharing_frequency_table <- rbind(enhancer_sharing_frequency_table, this.shared)
}
colnames(enhancer_sharing_frequency_table) <- c("FRB", "KRT", "MEL", "FRB_KRT", "FRB_MEL", "KRT_MEL", "FRB_KRT_MEL","gene")

# annotate gene by gene cluster info
gene_cluster <- data.frame(gene=rownames(km_res.rna.new), cluster=km_res.rna.new$newclass)
enhancer_sharing_frequency_table <- left_join(enhancer_sharing_frequency_table, gene_cluster, by="gene")
enhancer_sharing_frequency_table <- left_join(enhancer_sharing_frequency_table, enhancer_sharing_table[,c("gene", "total_enhancers_of_this_gene")])
enhancer_sharing_frequency_table$enhancer_size_group <- ifelse(enhancer_sharing_frequency_table$total_enhancers_of_this_gene < 5, "low",
                                                               ifelse(enhancer_sharing_frequency_table$total_enhancers_of_this_gene > 10, "high",
                                                                      "medium"))
# plot distribution of enhancer total counts overall
hist(as.numeric(enhancer_sharing_table$total_enhancers_of_this_gene), breaks=40)
# < 5 is low, 5-10 is medium, >10 is high

# plot enhancer-sharing frequency distribution grouped by cluster
df <- enhancer_sharing_frequency_table %>% dplyr::filter(enhancer_size_group=="low")
df <- enhancer_sharing_frequency_table
ggplot(df, aes(y=as.numeric(MEL))) +
  geom_histogram()+
  facet_wrap(~cluster)

# plot RNA-seq zlog2CPM heatmap of genes with enhancer
this.df <- enhancer_sharing_frequency_table
this.df[,1] <- as.numeric(this.df[,1])
this.df[,2] <- as.numeric(this.df[,2])
this.df[,3] <- as.numeric(this.df[,3])
this.df[,4] <- as.numeric(this.df[,4])
this.df[,5] <- as.numeric(this.df[,5])
this.df[,6] <- as.numeric(this.df[,6])
this.df[,7] <- as.numeric(this.df[,7])

pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/heatmap_enhancer-sharing-frequency_reordered_RNAseq_inducedGenes_14kmm-hc_04042023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
heatmap.enhancer.frequency <- draw(Heatmap(this.df[,1:7] , 
                            name = "frequency",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            row_split = this.df[,"cluster"], 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

# plot enhancer sharing heatmap of genes with enhancer
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/heatmap_enhancer-sharing-frequency_reordered_RNAseq_inducedGenes-with-enhancer_14kmm-hc_04042023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(enhancer_sharing_frequency_table[,1:7] , 
                            name = "frequency",
                            column_title = "enhancer sharing frequency of 451 induced genes that have an annotated enhancer",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            row_split = enhancer_sharing_frequency_table$cluster, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

# plot violin plot of enhancer sharing frequency
# distribution of sharing_3 across clusters
# distribution of sharing_1 across clusters
```
## Bar-plot of inducible enhancer proportion per cluster
```{r barplot-inducible-enhancer-proportion}

```
# DESeq2 on ATACseq regulatory region peaks
```{r atac-deseq2}
#load(paste0(Dir,"/myEnvironment_ATACseq_DESeq2_all_regions.RData"))

library(DESeq2)
outDir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/ATACseq_DolphinNext/DESeq2"
# load ATACseq data
atac_coverage_dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/chromatin/RegulatoryElements/method3"
# load raw coverage for all regions
count_atac <- data.table::fread(paste0(atac_coverage_dir,"/merged_coverage_ATACseq_allcts_allregions_1kbp.bed")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(chr,start,end)) %>% column_to_rownames("name")

# metadata
metadata <- data.frame(sample=colnames(count_atac)) %>%
  tidyr::separate( . , sample, into=c("donor","celltype","condition"), sep="_", remove=FALSE)

# filter for regions with enough coverage
# CPM
col.sum=apply(count_atac,2,sum); 
CPM_atac=sweep(count_atac, 2, col.sum, `/`)*1000000

# DESeq2 for melanocytes ATACseq
expressed_region_mel <- CPM_atac[which(rowMeans(CPM_atac)>10),colnames(count_atac)[grepl("MEL",colnames(count_atac))]] %>% rownames()
atac.dds.mel <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = count_atac[,colnames(count_atac)[grepl("MEL",colnames(count_atac))]],
                              colData = metadata[which(metadata$celltype=="MEL"),],
                              design = ~ donor + condition)
atac.dds.mel <- DESeq(atac.dds.mel)
atac.dds.mel <- estimateSizeFactors(atac.dds.mel)
results(atac.dds.mel,contrast=c("condition", "IFN", "PBS")) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("region") %>%
  dplyr::filter(padj<0.5 & log2FoldChange > 1.5) %>% nrow()
summary(results(atac.dds.mel,contrast=c("condition", "IFN", "PBS")))
res.atac.dds.mel <- results(atac.dds.mel,contrast=c("condition", "IFN", "PBS")) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("region")
res.atac.dds.mel$dynamic <- ifelse(res.atac.dds.mel$padj<0.5 & res.atac.dds.mel$log2FoldChange>1.5, "open",
                              ifelse(res.atac.dds.mel$padj<0.5 & res.atac.dds.mel$log2FoldChange < -1.5, "closed",NA))

# 300bp region:
# out of 426617 with nonzero total read count
# adjusted p-value < 0.1
# LFC > 0 (up)       : 58219, 14%
# LFC < 0 (down)     : 52801, 12%
# outliers [1]       : 0, 0%
# low counts [2]     : 99254, 23%
# (mean count < 13)

# 1kbp region: (352179)
# out of 426620 with nonzero total read count
# adjusted p-value < 0.1
# LFC > 0 (up)       : 67130, 16%
# LFC < 0 (down)     : 52962, 12%
# outliers [1]       : 0, 0%
# low counts [2]     : 74441, 17%
# (mean count < 21)

# DESeq2 for keratinocytes
expressed_region_krt <- CPM_atac[which(rowMeans(CPM_atac)>10),colnames(count_atac)[grepl("KRT",colnames(count_atac))]] %>% rownames()
atac.dds.krt <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = count_atac[,colnames(count_atac)[grepl("KRT",colnames(count_atac))]],
                              colData = metadata[which(metadata$celltype=="KRT"),],
                              design = ~ donor + condition)
atac.dds.krt <- DESeq(atac.dds.krt)
atac.dds.krt <- estimateSizeFactors(atac.dds.krt)
summary(results(atac.dds.krt,contrast=c("condition", "IFN", "PBS")))
res.atac.dds.krt <- results(atac.dds.krt,contrast=c("condition", "IFN", "PBS")) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("region")
res.atac.dds.krt$dynamic <- ifelse(res.atac.dds.krt$padj<0.5 & res.atac.dds.krt$log2FoldChange>1.5, "open",
                              ifelse(res.atac.dds.krt$padj<0.5 & res.atac.dds.krt$log2FoldChange < -1.5, "closed",NA))

# 300bp region:
# out of 426620 with nonzero total read count
# adjusted p-value < 0.1
# LFC > 0 (up)       : 22109, 5.2%
# LFC < 0 (down)     : 18641, 4.4%
# outliers [1]       : 0, 0%
# low counts [2]     : 124068, 29%
# (mean count < 18)

# # 1kbp region: (310823)
# out of 426620 with nonzero total read count
# adjusted p-value < 0.1
# LFC > 0 (up)       : 18704, 4.4%
# LFC < 0 (down)     : 16939, 4%
# outliers [1]       : 0, 0%
# low counts [2]     : 115797, 27%
# (mean count < 46)

# DESeq2 for fibroblasts
expressed_region_frb <- CPM_atac[which(rowMeans(CPM_atac)>10),colnames(count_atac)[grepl("FRB",colnames(count_atac))]] %>% rownames()
atac.dds.frb <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = count_atac[,colnames(count_atac)[grepl("FRB",colnames(count_atac))]],
                              colData = metadata[which(metadata$celltype=="FRB"),],
                              design = ~ donor + condition)
atac.dds.frb <- DESeq(atac.dds.frb)
atac.dds.frb <- estimateSizeFactors(atac.dds.frb)
summary(results(atac.dds.frb,contrast=c("condition", "IFN", "PBS")))
res.atac.dds.frb <- results(atac.dds.frb,contrast=c("condition", "IFN", "PBS")) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("region")
res.atac.dds.frb$dynamic <- ifelse(res.atac.dds.frb$padj<0.5 & res.atac.dds.frb$log2FoldChange>1.5, "open",
                              ifelse(res.atac.dds.frb$padj<0.5 & res.atac.dds.frb$log2FoldChange < -1.5, "closed",NA))

# 300bp region:
# out of 426620 with nonzero total read count
# adjusted p-value < 0.1
# LFC > 0 (up)       : 24205, 5.7%
# LFC < 0 (down)     : 12576, 2.9%
# outliers [1]       : 0, 0%
# low counts [2]     : 140611, 33%
# (mean count < 13)

# 1kbp region: (294281 regions)
# out of 426620 with nonzero total read count
# adjusted p-value < 0.1
# LFC > 0 (up)       : 19047, 4.5%
# LFC < 0 (down)     : 7249, 1.7%
# outliers [1]       : 0, 0%
# low counts [2]     : 132339, 31%
# (mean count < 30)

# write to file
saveRDS(res.atac.dds.frb, file=paste0(outDir,"/DESeq2_results_ATACseq_peaks_1kb_FRB.Rdata"))
saveRDS(res.atac.dds.krt, file=paste0(outDir,"/DESeq2_results_ATACseq_peaks_1kb_KRT.Rdata"))
saveRDS(res.atac.dds.mel, file=paste0(outDir,"/DESeq2_results_ATACseq_peaks_1kb_MEL.Rdata"))
```
# DESeq2 on H3K27ac ChIPseq regulatory region peaks
```{r chip-deseq2}
#library(DESeq2)
outDir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/ChIP-seq/DESeq2"
# load ChIPseq data
chip_coverage_dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/chromatin/RegulatoryElements/method3"
# load raw coverage for all regions
# other file names: 
# 1. merged_coverage_ChIPseq_allcts_regulatory_region.bed: 300bp size promoter and enhancer
# 2. merged_coverage_ChIPseq_allcts_allregions.bed: 300bp sized regions flanking all-sample-merged ATACseq summits.
count_chip <- data.table::fread(paste0(chip_coverage_dir,"/merged_coverage_ChIPseq_allcts_allregions_1kbp.bed")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(chr,start,end)) %>% column_to_rownames("name")

# metadata
metadata <- data.frame(sample=colnames(count_chip)) %>%
  tidyr::separate( . , sample, into=c("donor","celltype","condition"), sep="_", remove=FALSE)

# DESeq2 for melanocytes H3K27ac ChIP-seq
chip.dds.mel <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = count_chip[,colnames(count_chip)[grepl("MEL",colnames(count_chip))]],
                              colData = metadata[which(metadata$celltype=="MEL"),],
                              design = ~ donor + condition)
chip.dds.mel <- DESeq(chip.dds.mel)
chip.dds.mel <- estimateSizeFactors(chip.dds.mel)
summary(results(chip.dds.mel,contrast=c("condition", "IFN", "PBS")))
res.chip.dds.mel <- results(chip.dds.mel,contrast=c("condition", "IFN", "PBS")) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("region")
res.chip.dds.mel$dynamic <- ifelse(res.chip.dds.mel$padj<0.5 & res.chip.dds.mel$log2FoldChange>1.5, "gainH3K27ac",
                              ifelse(res.chip.dds.mel$padj<0.5 & res.chip.dds.mel$log2FoldChange < -1.5, "loseH3K27ac",NA))

# DESeq2 results for 300bp flanking regions:
# out of 426495 with nonzero total read count
# adjusted p-value < 0.1
# LFC > 0 (up)       : 2280, 0.53%
# LFC < 0 (down)     : 649, 0.15%
# outliers [1]       : 0, 0%
# low counts [2]     : 0, 0%
# (mean count < 0)

# DESeq2 results for 1000bp flanking regions:
# out of 426620 with nonzero total read count
# adjusted p-value < 0.1
# LFC > 0 (up)       : 7743, 1.8%
# LFC < 0 (down)     : 8107, 1.9%
# outliers [1]       : 0, 0%
# low counts [2]     : 322577, 76%
# (mean count < 11)


# DESeq2 for keratinocytes
chip.dds.krt <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = count_chip[,colnames(count_chip)[grepl("KRT",colnames(count_chip))]],
                              colData = metadata[which(metadata$celltype=="KRT"),],
                              design = ~ donor + condition)
chip.dds.krt <- DESeq(chip.dds.krt)
chip.dds.krt <- estimateSizeFactors(chip.dds.krt)
summary(results(chip.dds.krt,contrast=c("condition", "IFN", "PBS")))
res.chip.dds.krt <- results(chip.dds.krt,contrast=c("condition", "IFN", "PBS")) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("region")
res.chip.dds.krt$dynamic <- ifelse(res.chip.dds.krt$padj<0.5 & res.chip.dds.krt$log2FoldChange>1.5, "gainH3K27ac",
                              ifelse(res.chip.dds.krt$padj<0.5 & res.chip.dds.krt$log2FoldChange < -1.5, "loseH3K27ac",NA))

# DESeq2 results for 1000bp flanking regions:
# out of 426606 with nonzero total read count
# adjusted p-value < 0.1
# LFC > 0 (up)       : 4386, 1%
# LFC < 0 (down)     : 394, 0.092%
# outliers [1]       : 0, 0%
# low counts [2]     : 347378, 81%
# (mean count < 9)

# DESeq2 for fibroblasts
chip.dds.frb <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = count_chip[,colnames(count_chip)[grepl("FRB",colnames(count_chip))]],
                              colData = metadata[which(metadata$celltype=="FRB"),],
                              design = ~ donor + condition)
chip.dds.frb <- DESeq(chip.dds.frb)
chip.dds.frb <- estimateSizeFactors(chip.dds.frb)
summary(results(chip.dds.frb,contrast=c("condition", "IFN", "PBS")))

res.chip.dds.frb <- results(chip.dds.frb,contrast=c("condition", "IFN", "PBS")) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("region")
res.chip.dds.frb$dynamic <- ifelse(res.chip.dds.frb$padj<0.5 & res.chip.dds.frb$log2FoldChange>1.5, "gainH3K27ac",
                              ifelse(res.chip.dds.frb$padj<0.5 & res.chip.dds.frb$log2FoldChange < -1.5, "loseH3K27ac",NA))

# DESeq2 results for 1000bp flanking regions:
# out of 426620 with nonzero total read count
# adjusted p-value < 0.1
# LFC > 0 (up)       : 5815, 1.4%
# LFC < 0 (down)     : 435, 0.1%
# outliers [1]       : 0, 0%
# low counts [2]     : 297763, 70%
# (mean count < 13)

# save image
#save.image(paste0(Dir,"/myEnvironment_ChIPseq_DESeq2_all_regions.RData"))
saveRDS(res.chip.dds.frb, file=paste0(outDir,"/DESeq2_results_H3K27acChIPseq_peaks_1kb_FRB.Rdata"))
saveRDS(res.chip.dds.krt, file=paste0(outDir,"/DESeq2_results_H3K27acChIPseq_peaks_1kb_KRT.Rdata"))
saveRDS(res.chip.dds.mel, file=paste0(outDir,"/DESeq2_results_H3K27acChIPseq_peaks_1kb_MEL.Rdata"))
```

# ATACseq/ChIPseq signal dynamics at regulatory regions
```{r atac-chip-signal-dynamics-by-gene-cluster}
# annotate for the 14 cluster genes: gene-cluster, promoter, enhancer, DAcc_MEL, DAcc_KRT, DAcc_FRB, DChIP_MEL, DChIP_KRT, DChIP_FRB
#View(km_res.rna.new)
gene_info <- data.frame(gene=rownames(km_res.rna.new),
                        gene_cluster=km_res.rna.new$newclass,
                        gene_in_cluster_order=km_res.rna.new$within_cluster_order)
dir.krt <- "~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/RNA-Seq/keratinocytes/pipeline_11192022/analysis"
dir.mel <- "~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/RNA-Seq/melanocytes/pipeline_12022022/analysis"
dir.frb <- "~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/RNA-Seq/fibroblasts/pipeline_11192022/analysis"
rna.res.krt <- read.table(paste0(dir.krt,"/DESeq2_results_IFNvsPBS.txt"),header=T,sep=" ") %>% na.omit()
rna.res.mel <- read.table(paste0(dir.mel,"/DESeq2_results_IFNvsPBS.txt"),header=T,sep=" ") %>% na.omit()
rna.res.frb <- read.table(paste0(dir.frb,"/DESeq2_results_IFNvsPBS.txt"),header=T,sep=" ") %>% na.omit()

# MEL
expressed_gene_info <- gene_info %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% expressed_gene_MEL)
this_promoter <- right_join(expressed_gene_info, link_gene_promoter, by="gene") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(celltype=="MEL") %>% dplyr::select(-c("chr","start","end","name","celltype")) %>% set_colnames(c("gene","gene_cluster","gene_in_cluster_order","region","region_type"))

this_enhancer <- right_join(expressed_gene_info, link_gene_enhancer, by="gene") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(celltype=="MEL") %>% dplyr::select(-c("chr","start","end","name","celltype")) %>% set_colnames(c("gene","gene_cluster","gene_in_cluster_order","region","region_type"))

this_cRE <- rbind(this_promoter, this_enhancer) %>% 
  left_join( . , res.atac.dds.mel, by="region") %>%
  mutate(DAcc = dynamic) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c("baseMean","log2FoldChange","lfcSE","stat","pvalue","padj","dynamic")) %>%
  left_join( . , res.chip.dds.mel, by="region") %>%
  mutate(DK27ac = dynamic) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c("baseMean","log2FoldChange","lfcSE","stat","pvalue","padj","dynamic")) %>%
  left_join( . , rna.res.mel, by="gene") %>%
  mutate(DE = ifelse(.$padj < 0.05 & .$log2FoldChange > 1.5, 
                       "up",
                       ifelse(.$padj < 0.05 & .$log2FoldChange < -1.5, "down", "unclear"))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c("baseMean","log2FoldChange","lfcSE","stat","pvalue","padj")) %>%
  arrange(gene_cluster,gene_in_cluster_order)
this_cRE$DAcc[is.na(this_cRE$DAcc)] <- "unclear"
this_cRE$DAcc <- ordered(this_cRE$DAcc, levels=c("open","closed","unclear"))
this_cRE$DK27ac[is.na(this_cRE$DK27ac)] <- "unclear"
this_cRE$DK27ac <- ordered(this_cRE$DK27ac, levels=c("gainH3K27ac","loseH3K27ac","unclear"))
this_cRE$DE <- ordered(this_cRE$DE, levels=c("up","down","unclear"))
MEL_cRE_dynamics <- this_cRE

# KRT
expressed_gene_info <- gene_info %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% expressed_gene_KRT)
this_promoter <- right_join(expressed_gene_info, link_gene_promoter, by="gene") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(celltype=="KRT") %>% dplyr::select(-c("chr","start","end","name","celltype")) %>% set_colnames(c("gene","gene_cluster","gene_in_cluster_order","region","region_type"))

this_enhancer <- right_join(expressed_gene_info, link_gene_enhancer, by="gene") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(celltype=="KRT") %>% dplyr::select(-c("chr","start","end","name","celltype")) %>% set_colnames(c("gene","gene_cluster","gene_in_cluster_order","region","region_type"))

this_cRE <- rbind(this_promoter, this_enhancer) %>% 
  left_join( . , res.atac.dds.krt, by="region") %>%
  mutate(DAcc = dynamic) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c("baseMean","log2FoldChange","lfcSE","stat","pvalue","padj","dynamic")) %>%
  left_join( . , res.chip.dds.krt, by="region") %>%
  mutate(DK27ac = dynamic) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c("baseMean","log2FoldChange","lfcSE","stat","pvalue","padj","dynamic")) %>%
  left_join( . , rna.res.krt, by="gene") %>%
  mutate(DE = ifelse(.$padj < 0.05 & .$log2FoldChange > 1.5, 
                       "up",
                       ifelse(.$padj < 0.05 & .$log2FoldChange < -1.5, "down", "unclear"))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c("baseMean","log2FoldChange","lfcSE","stat","pvalue","padj")) %>%
  arrange(gene_cluster,gene_in_cluster_order)
this_cRE$DAcc[is.na(this_cRE$DAcc)] <- "unclear"
this_cRE$DAcc <- ordered(this_cRE$DAcc, levels=c("open","closed","unclear"))
this_cRE$DK27ac[is.na(this_cRE$DK27ac)] <- "unclear"
this_cRE$DK27ac <- ordered(this_cRE$DK27ac, levels=c("gainH3K27ac","loseH3K27ac","unclear"))
this_cRE$DE <- ordered(this_cRE$DE, levels=c("up","down","unclear"))
KRT_cRE_dynamics <- this_cRE

# FRB
expressed_gene_info <- gene_info %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% expressed_gene_FRB)
this_promoter <- right_join(expressed_gene_info, link_gene_promoter, by="gene") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(celltype=="FRB") %>% dplyr::select(-c("chr","start","end","name","celltype")) %>% set_colnames(c("gene","gene_cluster","gene_in_cluster_order","region","region_type"))

this_enhancer <- right_join(expressed_gene_info, link_gene_enhancer, by="gene") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(celltype=="FRB") %>% dplyr::select(-c("chr","start","end","name","celltype")) %>% set_colnames(c("gene","gene_cluster","gene_in_cluster_order","region","region_type"))

this_cRE <- rbind(this_promoter, this_enhancer) %>% 
  left_join( . , res.atac.dds.frb, by="region") %>%
  mutate(DAcc = dynamic) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c("baseMean","log2FoldChange","lfcSE","stat","pvalue","padj","dynamic")) %>%
  left_join( . , res.chip.dds.frb, by="region") %>%
  mutate(DK27ac = dynamic) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c("baseMean","log2FoldChange","lfcSE","stat","pvalue","padj","dynamic")) %>%
  left_join( . , rna.res.frb, by="gene") %>%
  mutate(DE = ifelse(.$padj < 0.05 & .$log2FoldChange > 1.5, 
                       "up",
                       ifelse(.$padj < 0.05 & .$log2FoldChange < -1.5, "down", "unclear"))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c("baseMean","log2FoldChange","lfcSE","stat","pvalue","padj")) %>%
  arrange(gene_cluster,gene_in_cluster_order)
this_cRE$DAcc[is.na(this_cRE$DAcc)] <- "unclear"
this_cRE$DAcc <- ordered(this_cRE$DAcc, levels=c("open","closed","unclear"))
this_cRE$DK27ac[is.na(this_cRE$DK27ac)] <- "unclear"
this_cRE$DK27ac <- ordered(this_cRE$DK27ac, levels=c("gainH3K27ac","loseH3K27ac","unclear"))
this_cRE$DE <- ordered(this_cRE$DE, levels=c("up","down","unclear"))
FRB_cRE_dynamics <- this_cRE
rm(this_cRE)

saveRDS(FRB_cRE_dynamics, file=paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/FRB_gene_and_cRE_RNA_ATAC_and_H3K27ac_dynamics.Rdata"))
saveRDS(MEL_cRE_dynamics, file=paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/MEL_gene_and_cRE_RNA_ATAC_and_H3K27ac_dynamics.Rdata"))
saveRDS(KRT_cRE_dynamics, file=paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA_round2/KRT_gene_and_cRE_RNA_ATAC_and_H3K27ac_dynamics.Rdata"))
```

# dissimilarity of induction across cell types & it's relationship with enhancer properties
## compare FRB to MEL on average, for a given gene.
1. How many enhancers are shared?
2. How many enhancers are MEL specific
3. How many are FRB specific
If you could add KRT to this it would be awesome. 
```{r induction_vs_enhancer_set-up}
# summarize opened regions and gainH3K27ac regions
open.mel <- MEL_cRE_dynamics %>% filter(region_type=="enhancer" & DAcc=="open")
open.frb <- FRB_cRE_dynamics %>% filter(region_type=="enhancer" & DAcc=="open")
open.krt <- KRT_cRE_dynamics %>% filter(region_type=="enhancer" & DAcc=="open")
open.all <- intersect(open.frb$region,intersect(open.krt$region,open.mel$region))

gainK27ac.mel <- MEL_cRE_dynamics %>% filter(region_type=="enhancer" & DK27ac=="gainH3K27ac")
gainK27ac.krt <- KRT_cRE_dynamics %>% filter(region_type=="enhancer" & DK27ac=="gainH3K27ac")
gainK27ac.frb <- FRB_cRE_dynamics %>% filter(region_type=="enhancer" & DK27ac=="gainH3K27ac")
gainK27ac.all <- intersect(gainK27ac.mel$region,intersect(gainK27ac.krt$region,gainK27ac.frb$region))

df <- data.frame(gene = character(),
                 common = character(),
                 MEL_and_FRB = character(),
                 FRB_and_KRT = character(),
                 MEL_and_KRT = character(),
                 MEL_only = character(),
                 KRT_only = character(),
                 FRB_only = character(),
                 opened_enhancer_common = character(),
                 opened_enhancer_MEL_only = character(),
                 opened_enhancer_KRT_only = character(),
                 opened_enhancer_FRB_only = character(),
                 gainedH3K27ac_enhancer_common = character(),
                 gainedH3K27ac_enhancer_MEL_only = character(),
                 gainedH3K27ac_enhancer_KRT_only = character(),
                 gainedH3K27ac_enhancer_FRB_only = character(),
                 stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

for (n in 1:length(rownames(km_res.rna.new))) {
  g <- rownames(km_res.rna.new)[n]
  g_enhancer_frb <- link_gene_enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(celltype=="FRB" & gene==g) %>% pull(region)
  g_enhancer_mel <- link_gene_enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(celltype=="MEL" & gene==g) %>% pull(region)
  g_enhancer_krt <- link_gene_enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(celltype=="KRT" & gene==g) %>% pull(region)
  g_enhancer_common <- intersect(g_enhancer_frb, intersect(g_enhancer_krt, g_enhancer_mel))
  g_enhancer_MELnFRB <- setdiff(intersect(g_enhancer_frb, g_enhancer_mel), g_enhancer_krt)
  g_enhancer_FRBnKRT <- setdiff(intersect(g_enhancer_frb, g_enhancer_krt), g_enhancer_mel)
  g_enhancer_MELnKRT <- setdiff(intersect(g_enhancer_mel, g_enhancer_krt), g_enhancer_frb)
  g_enhancer_MELonly <- setdiff(g_enhancer_mel, union(g_enhancer_frb, g_enhancer_krt))
  g_enhancer_KRTonly <- setdiff(g_enhancer_krt, union(g_enhancer_frb, g_enhancer_mel))
  g_enhancer_FRBonly <- setdiff(g_enhancer_frb, union(g_enhancer_krt, g_enhancer_mel))
  g_opened_enhancer_common <- intersect(open.all, g_enhancer_common)
  g_opened_enhancer_MELonly <- intersect(open.mel$region, g_enhancer_MELonly)
  g_opened_enhancer_KRTonly <- intersect(open.krt$region, g_enhancer_KRTonly)
  g_opened_enhancer_FRBonly <- intersect(open.frb$region, g_enhancer_FRBonly)
  g_gainedH3K27ac_enhancer_common <- intersect(gainK27ac.all, g_enhancer_common)
  g_gainedH3K27ac_enhancer_MELonly <- intersect(gainK27ac.mel$region, g_enhancer_MELonly)
  g_gainedH3K27ac_enhancer_KRTonly <- intersect(gainK27ac.krt$region, g_enhancer_KRTonly)
  g_gainedH3K27ac_enhancer_FRBonly <- intersect(gainK27ac.frb$region, g_enhancer_FRBonly)
```
